TEXT.Text: For my brother.

Yes! Right! You told me you saw Sankah?%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}(You tell Thomas what happened..)%% Umm.. so, Sanka was blacked out after unknown girl's food then, when come to his sense, he started to attack everyone around him?%% Once you beat him, he came back to normal.. alright, now I can understand. Huh? But questions are still remained.. why they were trying to play Sanka and Kunka?%% I have no idea.. So far, only Kunka knows the answer. So, meet him to hear whole story.
Kunka is not as bad a person as you think..%% This is weird. I, Wookiboki, need to check this out. I will let you know if I have anything.

But.. hmm.. Kunka might be angry if he has heard of Sanka's plight..%% If he has the same affliction as Sanka then we will need to make him normal again won't we?%% Let's investigate the mission mode in Canyon of Oblivion.
Come back if you would like to try.
This has the utmost importance so, please try your best!
Clear Canyon of Oblivion Arcade Mode (F1)
Port of the Winds
Reed Swamp
Decker Shark Piers

Your bag is full. Free up some space before proceeding with a quest.
Your bag is full. Free up some space before proceeding with a quest.

I refuse.
I'm doing it.

The Couple/Wedding Quest can only be completed once.
The adventure begins!
Let's get those wolves!
Ack! Help! Please help!%% There are wolves attacking people at the town entrance!%% If they're not stopped, they'll get into the town and hurt everyone!%%
Thank you so much master %class%. That will teach those pesky wolves a lesson.%% Here's a little token of our appreciation. Thanks again.
There's no need to hesitate, let's go!
Where do you think you're going? There's nothing that way! Come on, lets go the other way.

Ah! You're looking for the town? Look right and you'll see a portal to Odelia...%% Stand in the portal then press Z. There are people in there that needs your help.%% The increased wolf attacks have caused so much worry... And now this? The town chief's daughter has been kidnapped. Seriously, wolves kidnapping children? How crazy is that?%% The town chief knows more, you should ask him.
Do you see the portal to your right? Stand in the portal then press Z.
Looking for traces
Traces of Lylia
Hmmm? On your way to the Dragon Fellowship? In that case, can you help me out?
I fear for her safety... Please hurry!
Who might you be? Ah! You've found a clue! Yup. That's Lylia alright. It seems that there's no serious problem... Yet!%% There's still hope!

Hear me out first. Wolf packs have always gone around and attacked people.%% But they've never kidnapped people and such as if they have intelligence. They're either crazy or being controlled by someone, I'm sure of it!%% First go to {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} west of the town and search for any trace of my daughter Lylia. I think eradicating some monsters around there might help.%% If you find any clues, look for {C=0xFF016295/}John{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the Emergency Rescue Personnel in Windia Plains and show it to him!
Is there no one that can help my daughter?
Final Results
Talk to Alvin

You found evidence that Lylia was taken to {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? We can be sure that whoever kidnapped Lylia went to {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at least. %% Hmm, we have no idea where he went after that though. Let's see what I can find from this.. %% *Sniff *Sniff... There is an odd scent coming from the necklace. I will start a search using this scent. Maybe Alvin's dog can find something using this. %%
The Town Chief's daughter is in danger! Lets hurry up! Please!!!
Ah, You came! You're the one who found this evidence.
I need to know more about this clue... From the looks of it, I can't say where this is leading to... Please go to Alvin and have him take a look at this Necklace.
Lylia is still alive! Youngster! Don't do it!!!
Permission of the Town Chief
Talk to Dun Morgan

Hmmm... I don't know why Lylia was kidnapped by the wolves. But judging from this clue, I don't think she is in much danger... For now...%% What I'm wondering is why Lylia? That is the problem... In order to find out we have to rescue her first.
Why are you wasting time? Hurry up and rescue her!
What's going on? You need permission to go to the wolves den. Have you've heard something about my daughter?

Hmmm... Thank you for accepting to help us. Our priority for now is to secure Lylia's safety.%% I am almost certain that Lylia is in the Wolves' Den. In order to get there, we need a permission from the Town Chief... Well, since Lylia is his daughter I don't think we'll have a problem with that. Anyway, go meet Dun Morgan, the Town Chief.
Ah, Above all else saving Lylia is our main priority...There isn't anyone who's willing to step up. It really is a sad state of affairs.
Only one way!
Vagabond [Arcade Mode(F1)] Easy(F1)
Windia Plains [Arcade Mode F1]
Vagabond [Arcade Mode(F1)] Hard(F3)
You've found a trace of my daughter in the wolves' lair! I can't believe she's alive.%% Please save my daughter.
I fear we haven't got much time! Please make haste.

What? You've met those Vagabonds a few times already?%% Let's not get ahead of ourselves here. Save my daughter first. Could you give me a moment to think about this and talk to me again in a few seconds?
Thank you. You must complete Arcade Mode F1 to get to the lair.%% Clear the way by eliminating all the wolves then see me afterwards. The entrance is near the guard that helped you.%% Please hurry.
You must not give up. Please help my daughter.
In the Wolves Lair
Defeat Vagabond in Hero Mode(F5)
She's alive for now, but there are no guarantees!%% Please hurry!
The life of my daughter is at stake here. Please hurry.
Thank God! My daughter! You're alive! Thank you so much for saving her.%% I am so relieved she's alive and well.

Please save my daughter. I have no idea how she is right now. But I know she's in grave danger. Her traces seem to lead to the wolf's lair.%% The wolf's lair is located at {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains [Hero Mode F5]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% It's a fairly dangerous place, going there with a {C=0xFF016295/}Party{C=0xFF4D0D08/} would be a good idea.
Lylia is still alive! Don't be like this young man!
Morgan's Help
Talk to Alvin
Lylia, I think it's a miracle that you've returned without getting hurt. I'm sorry but there is nothing more we can do for Silver.
We need better security for the town.
So you're the one who saved Lylia, eh? Make sure you're prepared for the long journey ahead.%% Here is a book from Morgan. Its information will be helpful for you.

What? You want to investigate a little more? I hope my daughter's stubbornness is not too bothersome.%% But then again that doctor and that weird watchful eye may have something to do with what you're doing.%% Either way, be careful! If you need information about this area, you should see Alvin.
In any case, I'm just thankful that you saved my daughter.%% I won't put you in more danger just to save a dog. Thank you.
The Wolf Packs Movements
Smelly Wolf Claw
So Lylia said we need more investigation, right?%% Yes, I also have been thinking the overall status is odd recently...
Maybe it was a little too much for you...

Oh, you're back safely. I've taken care of this area for the longest time. I can estimate their movement based on the dirt that is caked on the claw.%% Can you wait a few minutes while I analyse this?

All you have to do is investigate what's going on at Advanced Windia Plains. Of course we would need some evidence to start the investigation, right?%% Maybe you can get us a Smelly Wolf Claw? So? You can do it right?%% Hunt Ember Wolves and you should be able to get it.
Well, you're not the only one that can investigate Advanced Windia Plains anyway. You don't really have to do it.
Secure the 4 roads
Vagabond [Arcade Mode(F1)] Easy(F1)
Adv Windia Plains [Arcade Mode F1]
Adv Windia Plains [Arcade Mode F1]
It may take some time to analyse the sample, perhaps you can scout a way for us.
There's still work to be done, come back later.
Ah, you're back. I was just finishing up with the sample. Give me a minute or two to finish up then talk to me again.

Good decision. It would have been boring just waiting around.%% Just think of this as a training exercise, scout the movements of the wolves then come back.%% Eliminate the wolves that wander around Advanced Windia Plains [Arcade Mode F1] and I think I'll be done with the sample by the time you get back.
Hmm... It may be a little boring, just waiting around... It's up to you, I'm not certain of how long this will take.
Another Wolf Lair
Puppy Rescue
I hope you didn't wait too long? I've analysed the claw you got me.%% And I think I know where they may be. Can you go there and investigate it?
Not ready yet? Make sure you're well prepared.
Silver~ Silver~ Oh~ My Silver~ You're safe~ I missed you so much Silver~ %name% saved you know that? Thank you so much.

I see. There has to be some reason why the pack leader Vegas is acting that way...%% You want to look into it more, huh? There should be another lair located somewhere in Advanced Windia Plains.%% Start your investigation there. I'd appreciate it if you let me know what you find out.
Okay then, thanks for your help anyway.
Clueless Mystery
Wounded Guard

Ugh... I've been so concerned about her but she doesn't understand that at all. She's only worried about Silver...%% Anyway, this case doesn't seem like a problem of our town only. That monstrous doctor lives at Port of the Winds, so I'm concerned on what could happen there.%% Hey, would you listen to me? {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is the most populated place on this continent. I can't even imagine how terrible it will be if anything happens there.%% Since you're already involved in this, please take care of it until everything is settled.%%
Thanks for saving my little girl.
Ugh... Ah... It hurts..........

Remember, in order to get to {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you need to pass {C=0xFF016295/}Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFF016295/}Canyon of Oblivion{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% The Sanka and Kunka bandits live around those areas. Recently, they started attacking the villagers. They invaded our village and took anything they fancy.%%Anyway, a guard's camp can be found near the entrance of Traitor's Ridge.%% Go there, find out the geography of the surrounding areas then settle things accordingly. Good luck.
W-What? What do you mean by saying no?
Wounded Guard - Mette
Water (Traitor's Ridge)
Please... give.. give me..water..I.. have.. not.. eaten.. in...a ...few...days..
Thank.. You...%%..gulp gulp..%%Yeah you saved me! %%Here, please accept this for your kindness. This is a pet egg, nobody knows what would hatch out of it. Each pet has different attirbutes.
W-Water! Bring me {C=0xFF016295/}5 water{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I will give you something you may be interested in.
Please... Please...
Attack of the Bandits
Talk to Thomas
Urgh... This mountain is too dangerous...%% Oh... I guess you know how to take care of yourself...*cough* Listen carefully...%% U-Udaka Bandits... Attacking humans... Ahk... Please... help...
I'm alright... Don't worry about me.
Hmmm... What am I doing here? I guess you have something to do with this.

That's... Traitor's Ridge... Right over there... Urgh...%% Sanka... These bandits kept a good... relationship with the humans before... I... don't know why... but they started to attack... us...%% Something's... not right... there has to be... a reason... Help... please... Find... Thomas...
Ahk! Please... Don't leave me here...
Twilight Curse (1)
Plunger Raccoon

I feel sorry for what happened to Mette. I'm relieved that it didn't get any worse.%% Anyway, before we start any investigation related to the Udaka Bandits, why don't we start with the nearby monsters first? They might be holding a valuable piece of information. Are we good?
You're not finished yet? Please hurry!
You've taken care of them all! You are as powerful as you look!
Great! While I'm checking the perimeter, why don't you erm... Hey, go kill 10 Raccoons, 10 Plunger Raccoons and 10 Scrappies, would you?

Oh well, what can I do? Maybe I misjudged you. I'll just keep protecting the town on my own!%% Could you move along then? I can't be held responsible for people just hanging around in dangerous areas!
Twilight Curse (2)
Monsters around Boss Sanka

You did a great job! Thanks to you, it was easier for me to concentrate on gathering information.%% You see that portal? I went in there and boy there was a massive army of monsters in there!%% I think slaying those monsters in the portal should be our top priority. Why don't we go deep into the Mission Map of Traitor's Ridge and wipe out those monsters? You're in, right?
What are you doing?%% Go ahead! I can't go until I know you went in safely. Now get in there!
You're stronger than I thought. I can't believe someone so young could be so skilled.%% Are you here to seek out the Dragon Fellowship? No wonder! Job well done.
Alright! I knew I could count on you!%% I will head further into Traitor's Ridge. Why don't you make your way to the Traitor's Ridge Mission Map to find Boss Sanka and kill the monsters around him?
You really can't?%% I figured that with your skills, we could clean up these areas together. Why don't you reconsider?
Strangest Feeling
Talk to Dun Morgan

Okay, now that we have a moment, let's introduce ourselves? Well. What's your name, my Dragon Fellowship candidate? %name%?%% Hmm~? Strange? Feel really familiar...... Yes!! Dun Morgan from Odelia!! You are the man who saved Don Morgan's daughter!%% I heard your story. I wanted to meet you.I didn't realise you were so young!%% Hahaha! Awesome! Seems like my youngster. Oh..! I got a question......
Hey, are you still here?
Look at this man! You are my daughter's saviour. Please ask me anything! I will willingly help you my hero!

Can you see any tourists around here? I've seen many people from Odelia to the Port of the Winds just a week ago but it suddenly stopped.%% I thought it was caused by bandits but it seems not. Tourists use the northern part of Traitor's Ridge and that is too far from the bandit's nest. So it is more than likely, not the bandits causing this.%% Maybe I'm looking into it too much, but my instincts tell me that something is wrong here..%% I'm sorry for disturbing you but could you please take a look around Odelia...? Ah! Don't worry, of course I'm not gonna make you walk. I will give you an{C=0xFF016295/} Odelia Return Scroll {C=0xFF4D0D08/}right now.%% You can go to Odelia directly using this. If you get there, please ask {C=0xFF016295/}Dun Morgan{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, if there are any problems there. Please.
I can't leave due to banits. Can you please think about it again?
Tourists Testimony (1)
Talk to Equipment Merchant Billy.
Hmm, Thomas sent you to this village? Actually... we got some troubles.
Ask Equipment Merchant Billy about the story he heard from the tourists.

Yes~! Welcome~ What kind of weapon do you need? Huh, you ain't gonna buy anything? Then how come...?%% what? Now you are collecting information at Dun Morgan's request? Umm... the story from tourist is that... one of our customers got hurt!%% A couple of wolves attacked him. According to him, there's a lot of wolves out there.

We had a big party that day that you saved my daughters life. Everyone was exhausted from partying all day and night. The next morning...%% Holy crap! We found a monster just right in front of Odelia! It seemed like a wolf and it stands on two legs... anyway all village people ran that monster out of this village so luckily we don't have any trouble.%% Furthermore, recently... Many tourists who went to Port of the Winds have kept returning. We are looking for the reason for it, but we haven't asked the tourists yet...%% If you don't mind, could you please investigate it? Maybe the tourists would have solid relationships with the merchants so let's go to them and ask them {C=0xFF016295/}especially from Equipment Merchant Billy{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Tourists have to get their weapons, so he may have some clues.
Yikee!! I'm an old man but do I have to go...?
Tourists Testimony (2)
Talk to Innkeeper Florence
Umm...! Nothing special except that. I think Innkeeper Florence would have better information about this.
Go to Innkeeper Florence.
Ah. Sorry we don't have a any vacancies anymore.

Weapons are optional, but sleeping is not. Innkeeper Florence has a lot of customers and guests these days, she may even want to open second Inn in her backyard and get some more guests. Sorry to hear about the tourists, it is a big thing for Innkeeper Florence!%% Tourists would go to the inn, so let's go to see her. She'll have more news from tourists.
Maybe you don't need that information anymore?
Tourists Testimony (3)
Talk to Town Chief Dun Morgan
Oh! You are not coming here for accommodation, just coming at the Town Chief Dun Morgan's request? What's that?
Did you try to meet Town Chief Dun Morgan?
Okay, did you meet a merchant? Tell me.%% Many tourists had been attacked by a couple of wolves at Traitor's Ridge?

Well... regarding tourists' talk... I got some actually.%% I assumed that most guests had been attacked by wolves. And someone talked about the place where they got attacked... Traitor's Ridge maybe. They've seen a wolf with two legs...%% Ah... a guest is calling me. I gotta go... so please talk about it to Town Chief Dun Morgan.
Hey, I'm busy man!!!
Analysis from a veteran warrior.
Talk to Thomas

Hmm... I don't know that place so I can't give you any further information. I think Thomas has more knowledge about Traitor's Ridge so please ask him for as much information as he can give you.%% Let's go to the Warp Tower over there and you can go to Thomas in the Traitor's Ridge directly.
This is not urgent, so take your time.

Well, you're finally back from out there. Is Odelia Okay?%% Tourists had been attacked by wolves so they were staying in the village? Where did they get attacked?%% What? Traitor's Ridge? That's so close to here... Hmm... that's strange..
Tourists are not fighters, so they didn't stand a chance. But wolves? That's nothing to you, right? Please give my regards to Thomas and I appreciate any help he can give you.
I don't have anyone to go to... Except you.
Finding a Witness.
Talk to Guppy.
Wolves have not been here for a while. Then they must have been attacked else where. Do you know where in Traitors Ridge it happened? Umm... if we know where it was, it would make this a lot easier.
Guppy is just there, right in front of you.
Yes, I'm Guppy who guards at here! Huh? Wolves? Let me see... I couldn't see a wolf around here frequently.
If it happened here, maybe we can find a witness... Ah maybe Guppy saw something!
Huh? It isn't a big deal?
Unexpected clue
Worn-out Novel
Wolves... wolves...! Hmm... I don't think I saw them. Hero! Can you please do me a favor anyway?
That is very very important book for me. Can you please give it to me by tonight?

OMG!! You brought it! Thank you soooooo much!!!!! %% And, I've been thinking about wolves while you were finding my book, and I've seen something like wolves a few days ago.%% I wasn't 100% sure so I didn't tell Thomas... {C=0xFF016295/}Howling Winds Hill{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was the place where the 'thing' went.%% Hmm, it must be a very important clue? Then please let Thomas know, I've seen something in Howling Winds Hill

I think I lost my novel! I was reading my book until I went to bed last night! It was such a great novel...... I can't search for it because I'm on the patrol mission so please find that book for me?%% Axel and Chango would be my prime suspects...%% I can't tell you its title but it is a worn out {C=0xFF016295/}novel{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Very interesting!! Please!
Oh, Yes...? I've seen those wolves around here... but you don't need to find them yet!
Finding the Wolve's Den!
Patrol Howling Wind's Hill

Oh, you got some idea of where the wolves are? That's good news! How did you get that information?%% Oh! Guppy saw them? I actually couldn't believe him due to his negligence but he did his job at least. I should call him later and encourage him to read more books!
Let's search the Howling Wind's Hill
Hel....hel.... Help!!! Help me!!!%% Sigh... Huh? A real human!! OMG!!! Thank God!!!~

Okay, so where's the place that Guppy saw them? What? Entry of Howling Wind's Hill? That is the primary route for tourists, from Odelia to Port of the Winds!%% It's an even bigger problem than I thought . If tourists can't get here anymore, we will be isolated! And we wouldn't have any way to let people know we are in danger, what if we are in trouble?%% I should really take them down... Well, anyway can you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Howling Wind's Hill{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and try to find the Wolves' Den?%% If wolves are coming from Howling Wind's Hill, the den must be there.
Disappointing... Don't you want to build up your reputation?
Slay Wolves
Slay a monsterous wolf.

My name is Keion. I had a plan to move to Port of the Winds from Odelia but we heard a rumor of sudden attacks from wolves. So we got together and went to Port of the Winds.%% We reached Traitor's Ridge and decided to rest for awhile just after we passed the road to Howling Winds Hill. We spotted wolves, but didn't take any notice of them and moved on.
Yikes... Cough! Cough! I can't move yet. Did you kill that monster?
Finally you're back! Did you slay that monster? Oh my heavenly father! I'm safe now!

It...! It was...!!!! It was definitely a monster!!!! {C=0xFFFF0000/}A wolf walking on two legs{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!!!%% We tried to fight it, but we lost one by one. Soon we fell into a chaotic situation.%% I don't even remember what happened, because we just ran away. I just fell down and then ran away as far as possible.%% I couldn't move after I woke up... maybe my leg has broken...but I can't feel the pain, I think I'm still in shock.%% You can find that monster in the cave by this portal just right behind me. Please kill that wolf!
Huh! You decided to abandon me?
Status Report
Talk to Thomas
I'm very sorry but could you do me another favor?
Are you still here? I don't know if I can hang on... Please hurry.

Oh! Did you find the Wolves' Den? It wasn't a big problem, right? They are just wolves!%% Huh? It was more than I thought? What's that? Wha...what? A walking wolf? Then the Wolves' Den must be their hometown or something! The problem is getting worse...%% If it is true, I need to go with my entire army and slay them. It's very dangerous!%% So do you have anymore information about the wolves powers and abilities? Did you say you made them flee? Awesome!!%% Now we need to stabalise this situation. Anything else?%% Did you find any injured people in Howling Wind's Hill? Roger that. I will send some troops over there right away. Hey! Guppy!!
If you find anyone along your way, please send help!%% I can't move with my broken leg!
Huh? Mommy... is this my end? Mom! Please forgive me...
Relax Now!
Talk to Dun Morgan
It was such a dangerous one. We are very lucky because we made them out before we get in trouble... I will ask Guppy about detail information when he brought wounded tourist.
Hey, we don't have enough time.

Umm~? %name%! welcome back! Did you give Thomas my regards?%% Wha...what!!? Did you find Wolves' Den?%% Holy crap! I thought it was nothing but it wasn't!! We were almost in a lot of trouble!!!%% So what's the result? Did you kill them? How great! Thank you indeed.%% I think I owe you again. Then, please accept this weapon. It will help you along your journey.%% We usually call talented warriors, Master. And we give special weapons to masters. You deserve to use this weapon, Master!.%% If we had {C=0xFFFF0000/}Fenris{C=0xFF4D0D08/} over here, he would be a big help. I haven't see him lately... Has he gone home maybe?
Could you go to Don Morgan in Odelia? Tell him we just wrapped up this situation and please do more security issue in the future. Do you know how to use a Puff Tower next me?
Huh? I don't think this is the right time to say like that.
Give my thanks to Thomas.
Talk to Thomas
I owe Thomas this time....
You can go there with Warp Tower at once.

Meeting Jeff

Ah, you're the one who got rid of those noisy wolves! I was looking for you actually. I'm going to let you in on a little secret, shhh...%% I'm joining the Dragon Fellowship! I heard there are untold treasures to be discovered where they're going!%% If I get in, I'll be able to get my hands on some of that, sweet! But I need to steal a recommendation letter in order for my plans to work.%% What? We need to be honest? Haha, you're pretty gullible! Seriously, think about it... An insane amount of treasure awaits!%% We're too young, they'll never let us in. Hmmm... I've divulged too much already.%% Anyway, now that you know the plan, you have no choice but to be my partner in crime!%% I'll give you your first mission... You're heading to Traitor's Ridge, right?%% My brother's in this plan as well! I need you to deliver this letter to him. So, I can trust you with this simple task, right?
Hey! Why are you still here? You're not running away with my letter, are you? Don't you dare think about it! We will hunt you down if you do!

Who are you? What? Jack asked you to give this letter to me? Well, let's have a look then...%%
{C=0xFF4400BB/}- To my dear older brother Jeff - Brother, how you've been? I think it's about time that we put our plan into action.%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}I have written my master plan here so read this in private. We're still on for the robbery at Traitor's Ridge tomorrow night, right?%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}The person next to you agreed to do it with us and can fight really well. All we have to do is buy lots of chocolates for the guards.%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}We'll throw it at them and it will start a famished chaos! Then we'll steal the Dragon Fellowship Recommendation Letter! What do you think of my plan? I stayed up all night plotting all these!%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}Bye!
- From your ingenious younger brother, Jack -%% T-This... I can't believe he... When will he... Will there ever be an end to...%% He's a genius! It's the perfect plan! It's great! Thank you! So you're strong eh? Let's do this then.

Good, good. You're smarter than I thought!%% My brother dresses just like me, you'll find him right away if you walk around Traitor's Ridge.%% My ingenuity is in this letter, so don't you dare lose it!
Who are you? What do you need from me?
What? Whatever! You are so naïve! If you don't want to then fine! But don't tell anyone about the plan, understood? If you do, well.... we won't let you off so easy!

Having been around the harbour for so long, you hear things not everyone gets to hear.%% I know why you are here, I've heard about it. And I know who your friends are. I'd tell you, but nothing's free in this world.%% My request is simple. A boat needs a sail, and sail is made from twine, and twine is sewn from fleece.%%Gather 5 Fleeces for me so I can sew enough twine.
Hey, where's my fleece?

I know you'll do me this favour. Go along now.

Old Friend (1)

Are you %name%? The famous %name%? How long has it been?%% I have information that might help you. If you go to Windia Plains, you'll find cute looking Woodies.%% But don't be fooled by their appearance, they attack without warning or provocation! I need you to kill 5 of them.

Someone who helps a friend in need is a friend indeed. Come back whenever you want.
We need to kill those Woodis!
Why won't you slay the Woodis? They're a danger to everyone!
Old Friend (2)
Brown Wolf

I envy your free spirit. I stand here guarding even though my knee hurts. Everyone's on their toes after the discovery of the journal.%% The Superior Officers warned us of that too. There must be some kind of a major conspiracy, but a mere guard like me don't know the details.%% What makes my work more difficult is the order to eliminate the wolves around here. How can you do two things at the same time? I really feel like quitting sometimes.%% But I can't do that. So, would you mind helping me?
Slay 7 Brown Wolves. You can find them at Windia Plains.
Thank you. Now I can concentrate on my patrolling duty.
Thank you. There's an old saying: Good friends are life's treasures.
Hey, did you hear what I said?
Sorcery Test (1)

Greetings! I am Pablo, the Arcanist! There are many young prodigies like yourself, who wish to be like me.%% I am looking for a successor, and he or she needs to pass my series of tests. The first test, is a test of courage: Slaying Woodies! How about it? Will you take this test?
There are many others who want to take the test. Make haste.
Congratulations on passing the first test.
Show me how courageous you are by slaying 5 Woodies.
You are unfit to be in the eyes of the Arcanist!
Sorcery Test (2)

There are 2 types of Magicians: the first one is focused on his or her will, and the other is the type that supports his or her team members using the laws of nature.%%However, there are magic practitioners who do not adhere to these principles.%%My sorcery is about helping the world, so follow my path to enlightenment.%%Well, that was a long talk. Now I will give you the second test. A test of wisdom. Bring me a Parchment so that you can pen your wisdom.
How can you pass the test at this rate?
Good job on passing the second test. It wasn't hard, was it?
This is not that hard a test, hurry and bring me the Parchment. Look for '?' and you'll accomplish this test.
You are quick to give up. Perhaps this was the wiser choice.
What do you need from me? A Papyrus?%% I don't know how you knew I have this, but here! Give this to Pablo. See you then!
Sorcery Test (3)
In order to be like me... You need courage, wisdom and will... Oh, include patience- a lot of it!%% The third test is a test of will. You need to slay Rams in Windia Plains.
Will you just hurry up!
Good work on your third test.
Slay 5 Rams in Windia Plains.
You have to walk the path of the warrior.
Sorcery Test (4)
Spider Poison

You are near the end of the trial. The last test is about the chosen path. It will not be easy.%% In your darkest hour, you must make important decisions. Follow your courage, or pursue your virtue.%% Summon your courage and slay some of those Spees and Spikes.
You do realize that it's not for fun, don't you? Choose wisely.
You passed the fourth test with flying colours.
Collect some of their poison and return to me.
What a pity that you're giving up at the last stage.
Lack of Wood
Greetings! We're a little shorthanded right now. Not only that, we're out of Firewood as well. Would you be able to help us out?
I suppose you're not going to be done any time now.
We don't need to worry anymore now that we have wood supply.
Thank you. You can obtain Plain Wood from Woodies at Windia Plains.
You are so selfish, sheesh!
Odelia (1)
Meet Heidi, then return to Adelio with the cake

It's good to see you again! So how is the life here? Good?%% The bounty hunter traffic has made this once peaceful village crowded and noisy again. There were 4 aristocrats who ran this village once.%% The village prospered under the model of trust and goodwill. However, 50 years ago, that trust became broken because of the war with Elga, the King of Darkness.%% That's why this village split into four pieces. And the person who set up the location for hunters was my father, Adelio.%% He handed his business over to me some time ago. I accept job offers that will help this village out of its slums. %% My business runs from Windia Plains, and extends far to Libra.%% I obtain a commission fee when I find people to carry out my jobs. How about it? You want to take my job offer?
My stomach's been growling all day long. Bring me that cake, hurry!
I can't help but be impressed at its taste every time I eat Jukombe cake, yumyum! This is how to live life! Want to give it a try?

Since this is your first time, I'll give you an easy job.%% Everyday, I get some food from Heidi, the general merchant. But she doesn't deliver food, so I have to make the trip myself. It bothers me.%% Bring me one piece of cake from her.
Why're you still here? I gave you the cake already. Are you interested in me?
You'll know you can't do anything without my help.
Hello, haven't seen you around here. What do you need from me? Ah, you came for Adelio's cake?%% Here it is! This is the most popular item from my hometown, Jukombe. Please deliver this to Adelio.
Odelia (2)

Our business is booming. It's strange though, how more job commissions are coming in these days.%% It's as if something big is going down at Windia Plains. And those pesky Woodies are really harassing our folk.%% Well, I don't really care about the details as long as I can earn my money. How about it?

Materialism (1)

Now, listen to me carefully. I'm about to give you golden advice about earning money easily. Money comes in the currencies of gold, silver and copper.%% The most precious is gold, then silver, and lastly copper. But hey, anything to strike it rich, right?%% Next best method is to work hard and earn some honest coin. So if you don't want to beg, you should accept my job offer.
If the snow stops, the fleece will be useless. Hurry up and go get me fleece.
I can't reward you accordingly if the price of fleece depreciates. Stop dawdling.
The weather here's being really weird lately. It's been snowing recently.%% The demand for fleece is very high all of sudden. Bring me 5 Fleece, and I'll reward you handsomely.
You want to be rich, don't you?

Oh this is very bad... oh please god..%% I have a son %% He has not come back since he went to the trade shop yesterday.%% Oh, this is terrible indeed! Where has he gone? A boy? %% Hmm, what's your relationship with him? You dont seem to be his father %% What's his name?%% Chuck? Ah, Florane's kid? He's a good boy. That sounds like him alright. I saw the boy last night in fact. He seemed to be in a rush to go somewhere to do something.%% I dismissed it as normal child-hood antics, but now you say he hasn't come back yet?%% Hrmm I knew I should have followed my instincts and found out what the boy was up to. %% I didn't know he was running away, he was always a good boy. Okay.%% I will launch a full investigation immediately. Please tell Florane that rest assured, Guard Walter is on the case!

Are you certain?%% Oh my god, this can't be!%% Has he really gone to the factory? I can't believe this... this is worse than I thought!%% He told me he got a ticket from a factory tour event to the Cookie Factory. He asked me to go there a few days ago but I refused.%% He must have gone there without me. Oh, how could I let this happen!%% When I find him... first I'll kiss him, then I'll kill him!
Thank you for your cooperation. We will take an action immediately!
What did you say? No??
Finding Chuck
Meet Detective Gordon

How can he be going to the Cookie Factory!? There are terrible rumors about that place.%% I'm sure you've heard %class%, I mean who doesn't know at this point. There was a mass food poisoning scandal at a magic school where students were eating cookies from that place.%% Oh, listen to me rambling... I can't take this anymore.%% I should do something. He is my boy!%% .%% Yes, of course! %class%, you could help me!%% Oh please, say you will!%% Oh thank you so much. There isn't much time. Please hurry and bring my boy back to me!%% I can't just rely on the guards, they have to wait several days before they can just enter the cookie factory to search for Chuck, and by then it could be too late!
If you don't have any thing else urgent to do, we had better leave soon ... .. Are you ready?

Greetings, my name is detective Gordon, Im here to investigate the mass food poisoning case that was reported to me recently.%% But who are you, exactly?%% Wait, what? A missing boy?%% Hrmm... Don't you look at me like that..%% I'm feeling bad Ahem . Hold on a second
Ah right! A detective came to the Port of the Winds recently. He is investigating the mass food poisoning case.%% Could you tell him about Chucks story? Please?
Dont you know this is serious business?!
Investigation Cooperation
Answer Detective Gordon's questions.

A missing boy hrmm ?%% Let me think %% All right, I will need to ask some questions before I can investigate this case.%% At the very least, I need to know the details about what, where, when or how; before I can begin my investigation.%% Can you provide this information?
No, no... That doesn't sound right! I will give you another chance. Please give make sure your information is accurate, or I can't help you.
Okay, that seems to be everything... and everything appears to check out. Thank you for answering my questions. You've been most helpful.
Just answer these few quick questions and we can proceed.
No..? You are such a weird person... I tried to help you with your investigation...
You mentioned that you were looking for a particular missing boy...? What was his name?
What about his mother's name?
You should know the descriptions. What does he look like?
Where was he headed to?
Hrmm? This is different to the information that I have. Why are you giving me incorrect information? I can't work with incorrect information!
Finding a Witness.
Finding a Witness.

I'm not certain yet but this missing child that you are looking for...%% I think he is somehow connected to my mass food poisoning investigation.%% Yes, the more I think of it... it seems very likely because the odds of these two events occuring in the same factory and not being related are astronomically low...%% Yes, it is decided then, I, detective Gordon will thoroughly investigate this 'Cookie Factory' and I WILL get to the bottom of all this!%% But don't for a second think that your involvement in this is done, I can always use a good sidekick.%% Come on then, what do you say? You must be as curious about this mysterious factory as I am, right?
As I told you before, without your cooperation, I cannot help to solve this mystery.

Huh? Who are you? %% Are you talking about that chubby kid, with the nice smile...? Yeah, I've seen him around. He's not very bright, but he always has a backpack filled with cookies and sweets so... Haha! %% I'm just teasing, of course I know him, nothing gets past me!

Okay. Let's keep thinking. Hmm.... lets try to connect the dots...where to start....%% .......%% Of course! Children! Chuck is just a small boy, can't be more than ten or eleven at the most! Did he travel directly to the Cookie Factory? Obviously not, kids these days have no sense of direction so that's most unlikely.%% So what would a boy like Chuck do. %% Maybe he asked an adult how to get there? No, illogical. An adult might tell his mother and ruin his plans. Of course, he must have tried to get some help from someone around his own age?%% Elementary, my dear Watson! The missing clue stares us in the face! One of the children around the port will have spoken to Chuck right before he disappeared.%% We must find this child, immediately!%% I think I heard that Jeff was seen hanging around the factory. You should start with him.%% Meanwhile, I'll continue gathering more information about this mysterious cookie factory.
Are you playing games...? Honestly Watson, I expected more from my favourite side-kick!
There´s no such thing as a free lunch
Empty box

Come on. You have to be kidding me?%% You want me to just tell you everything I know? Haven't you listened to a word I've been saying all this time? Don't you know that everything comes with a price. Haha. You aren't going to like this... %% Hey, come on... separate your personal affairs from business, ok? Relax. Alright, umm... since you are part of the gang, and my successor I'll give you a little discount.%% But you have to agree to do this favour for me, before I tell you what it is... then, I'll help you.
Not finished yet? I would have got them all myself by now!

Wow, impressive job. These look like some great quality boxes you have here. %% A deal's a deal. I'll tell you all I know about the kid you are looking for.%% Just give me a second to put my new boxes away and I'll tell you everything.

Come on, you look nervous. This is just like all those other times you did some errands for me.%% I told you, just accept my little favour and I'll let tell you everything I know about Chuck.%% Wait, what? You'll do it then? Haha... well I wasn't expecting that. You must really want to help this kid. Now I have to think of something for you to do... Ah I've got it! %% Recently, I've been trying to learn all I can about the art of camouflage with an empty box.%% HEY! Don't laugh, my favourite hero does it all the time... No one ever expects a thief to be hiding under a cardboard box. %% The problem is, I still haven't mastered the technique yet and I keep breaking the cardboard boxes I've been using. I've even used up all my spares! %% All you have to do is collect some new ones for me. %% I don't know, say 20? Simple, right? %% Hah, you have no idea how lucky you are... I'm not normally this generous, but being a part of the gang has its benefits... just remember that when it's time to pay your membership fee!
That's Fine (Don´t be so fastidious!)
Testimony of Sneaky Thief Jeff
Talk to Gordon

I saw Chuck the other night, he was standing near Mr. Yamaki in Port of the Winds...%% Come on, you do know who that is, don't you? The doorman in the Cookie Factory, Yamaki? Chuck was standing right in front of Yamaki and when he saw me he looked scared.%% So I asked him what he was doing there, I just figured Chuck was trying to get some free cookies from Mr. Yamaki.%% So I asked him 'Hey fatty, what are you doing here? Something funny in there?' But he didn't answer...%% So then, he turned to face me and pointed behind me. Being the curious thief I am, I turned to see what he was pointing at and when I looked back, Chuck had vanished. %% Me, Master Thief Extraordinaire! Fooled by the oldest trick in the book, by a fat kid named Chuck. If you ever tell anyone about this, I'll have you kicked out of the gang!%% But anyway, I noticed he dropped this little piece of paper right where he was standing. If you want it, it's yours. %% Well, that's all I know. Are you satisfied?%% No need to thank me, we need to stick together you know!
Why are you still here? I told you everything I know!

So, did you find an eye-witness?%% Excellent. Tell me everything, every little detail!%% (You tell Gordon everything Jeff told you.)%% Interesting... the plot thickens! Actually, I got a lucky break while investigating at the harbour.%% It seems that Chuck is not the only kid who has been kidnapped, there have also been several other reports of disappearances in the past few days.%%I'm convinced that something terrible has come to the Port of the Winds. Come Watson! The game is afoot!

Oh, just one more thing! Come on, don't look at me like that... Free of charge this time! %% That factory... you know it has had some problems these last few days, don't you?%% Well, everyone got food poisoned, after enoying a free sample cookie from that factory!%% Rumours are going around that they kidnapped people who didn't get food poisoning after tasting cookies from that factory.%% I think that maybe Chuck is caught up in the middle of all this... But what do I know, I'm just a kid, right?
Okaaay... I have my boxes, I don't really care anymore... do what you want!
Analysing the results
Cookie Factory Manager - To meet Yamaki

Ok, the pieces of this puzzle are coming together nicely... Let's just restate the facts we have so far.%% 1. Chuck won a ticket to tour the Cookie Factory. 2. Chuck disappeared the very next day after receiving his ticket.%% 3. Florane, Chuck's mom forbid Chuck from visiting the factory. 4. An eye-witness told us that Chuck was spotted entering the Cookie Factory.%% 5. More importantly, we now know that Chuck isn't the only child to have disappeared.%% I don't believe we need anymore evidence, searching the Cookie Factory is the only way to find him. Can you do that?
We still have a long way to go, hang in there.

Why did you come back so fast? Did you fail to get in there?%% What? invitations? %% Oh dear, of course. One of the people I questioned briefly mentioned an invitation. Yes... Let me just check my notes. Here it is... %% Oh dear, this is worse than I expected. Seems that there is no way to enter without an invitation. Now where do we get one...?

Well, good luck and remember once you eliminate the impossible, whatever remains, no matter how improbable, must be the truth!%% (You can enter the Cookie Factory by speaking to Yamaki in the Port of the Winds.)
What are you doing here? Did you forget about what you have to do?

Welcome %% You must be one of our winners, for the free factory tour event. Please present your ticket and I'll let you in. %% What? You don't have an invitation!? Sigh~ I am sorry but you can't enter here without an invitation.%% Got it? Huh?%% I don't know. Don't ask me. Ever since the new owner took over, I just stand here and let ticket holders inside.%% I am sorry but I don't know anything about what goes on inside this factory.%% In fact I've never even entered this particular factory. All I do is give permission to enter to anybody with an invitation or a ticket.%% So, if you don't have either then you can't enter!
Maestro of the forge
Cookie paper

Whoever is behind this has some sort type of plan in motion. They distributed only the exact number of invitations as there are missing children.%% Clearly they must have been very thorough in their scheming, but unfortunately, this makes getting you inside all the more difficult.%% These invitations are nowhere to be found. If we only we had a sample maybe I could create a forgery...%% What's that? Of course, that's it!%% Didn't you say that Jeff gave you a piece of paper that Chuck dropped? May I please examine that piece of paper once more?%% I'll have to use my magnifying glass ..%% .%% Yes! This is perfect!%% There is some small writing on this paper. It is quite difficult to make out, but I can see it with my magnifying glass. Let me read it to you...%%  We invite you to the Cookie Factory. If you have this invitation .%% Incredible! This is exactly what we need. It is part of an invitation for a tour of the Cookie Factory.%% What? We can't do anything with just a fragment of the invite?%% Oh, my silly Watson. It so happens that my misspent youth will serve us well here...%% Forging an invite with this should be a piece of cake. You should have seen some of my previous work... well, nevermind... I digress.%% Yes, don't worry about it. I can make a perfect invitation with the right materials.%% Of course, the paper must be the exact same as a normal invite, or it would be immediately obvious that it is a forgery. You will have to collect a similar material for the duplicating process.
Please return when you have all the required material. Hurry!

Welcome back, Watson. I trust this task was nothing more than you were capable of? I must admit I was a bit worried about you but I'm happy to see you return.%% Now it's my turn now to shine! Please give me those cookie papers.%% Great..%% .%% Hmm... Please just give me a moment, this is a very delicate process and I am not as young as I used to be.%%

Firstly, I need some sample materials. I can make a factory logo using the cookie papers as a sample.%% Where we can get one though?%% Hmm, they are dumping industrial waste out the back, so some of these papers must be dumped along with them.%% Now where would these dumped papers wind up......?%% Jigsaw Pincers Coast, of course! There will be plenty of cookie papers there.%% Collect 20 of them.
Watson, we're at a critical juncture here, I don't have time to play games!
Entering the Factory
Enter to Cookie Factory - Clear Difficulty Lv. 1

Ok, it's finished! Here is your invitation to the Cookie Factory Watson. Some of my best work, if I do say so myself.%% Of course it looks genuine, this could fool even me!%% Now you should be able to enter the Cookie Factory (Mission mode) with this invitation. %% Please hurry and investigate what is happening to those children. I fear they may be in great peril!%%
I know it's dangerous but we must solve this case before more children go missing!
What? A kid was turned into a monster? Oh my, how is that even possible?

Let's go over the plan once more...%% Go to Yamaki in the central platform of Port of the Winds and give him your faked invitation. %% He should then let you into the Cookie Factory in the same place as those missing children.%% I still don't know who is organising all of this, I fear we may have only scratched the service of whatever fiendish plot is taking place.%% Try to keep your eyes open for any clue, and stay safe! Without you I fear we may never get to the bottom of this mystery.
Now Watson, I thought we were getting along so well together!
Children in Danger (1)
Enter to Cookie Factory - Clear Difficulty Lv. 2
Enter to Cookie Factory - Clear Lv. 3

Things have gotten worse while you were away. Even more children have disappeared.%% What can this master villain be doing with all of these 'monster-children'? I mean, what sort of dastardly fiend does that!?!%% We cannot waste anymore time, we must get to the bottom of this or at the very least, begin rescuing all of the kidnapped children. %%
Well, I know this is dangerous mission, but don't you think we have to solve this case?

During your visit to the Factory, I've also asked for backup from the Port of the Winds guards. %% We dont have to do this job all alone, anymore. Take a quick rest, we've made startling progress so far...%% We still need to find this boy of yours... Chuck? Yes, of course. We must keep searching until we find him!
Return to the Cookie Factory and clear Lv. 2 and Lv. 3 also. Rescue as many children as you can! Hurry! Now! Go!
I had a good impression about you so far. Clearly I was mistaken!

The Port of the Winds guards will take care of the children you found and return them to their parents.%% You must continue the search for Chuck, or had you forgotten?%% Success sometimes has a habit of clouding one's perspective, we must return to our original goal and return young Chuck to his desperate mother.%% My detective instincts tell me that he is still in grave danger. You really must continue the search for him! %% Please continue your investigation of the factory until you find Chuck.
Well, I know this is dangerous mission, but don't you think we have to solve this case?
Did you find Chuck? %% Good. Now I can rest in peace. I will let everyone knows that we found a boy. %%
You haven't been to Lv.4 yet, right? At this point, it seems that there is a high probability that Chuck would be there. Please go there and be careful.
Hey, what are you talking about? The case is NOT solved yet!
Leftover Mysteries
Cookie Factory Floor-plan

Thanks to your great work, all the rescued children are now safe. Now the Port guards are searching the factory. %% You did really a good job. Great job ol' chum! But we still have no idea who the mastermind behind this evil scheme is...%% It just doesn't seem right to close this case as it is. We must bring the guilty to justice and ensure nothing like this ever happens again! Don't you agree?
Well, I know this is dangerous mission, but don't you think we have to solve this case?
Fantastic, you found one! A full Factory Floor-plan no less. We should have no problem tracking down our culprit now!

Yes, I knew you were the same kind of person as I. Well... First things first... %% I think there are definitely some hidden places in that huge factory... %% If you could find some type of factory map or Floor-plan, we could figure out any secret passages or hidden rooms. That would surely lead us to our villain. %% It may be rash to act without having a clear picture of the situation, but we have no choice. This terror cannot continue.%% If you can find a map or Floor-plan, finding the secret lair of this nemisis will become far less time consuming... and I fear time may be against us until we have thwarted this evil.%% Please begin the search immediately...
Hey. Do you think this investigation is some sort of game?! These are peoples lives you are messing with!
Inside the hidden place...
Clear Hero Mode of Cookie Factory (F5)

I have studied the Factory Floor-plan you brought me. %% There is indeed a secret entrance that leads to an area that you haven't visited before. Here let me show you. This is the suspicious entrance. %% I can make out some type of concealed entrance here, you should just be able to find a hidden switch to open the entrance.%% I don't forsee it being that much of a problem for you Watson. I can already tell you have learned much from our time working together. %% I would wager that our archnemisis is still hiding in their lair and planning very devious acts...%% You must hurry and stop our foe before they have time to orchestrate another maniacal scheme.
Well, I know this is dangerous mission, but don't you think we have to solve this case?

Phenomenal work my dear friend. Truly miraculous... the fact that you've survived this long, let alone proven yourself to be remarkably efficient at thwarting my every effort... you remind me of myself when I was your age...%% But you seem angry my young %class%, did you come all the way down here because you are angry at something? Was it something I did? %% Oh, that? Yes... that was all me... why, you ask? %% I've only held an event for my most valuable customers. I gave them what they always wanted, to be filled with chocolatey goodness! Is there something wrong? Was that not what you wanted to hear...?
You can enter the hidden area in the Factory by speaking to Yamaki as you did before. You will be able to access this new area now that you know of its existence. %% Go there! Now!
We are so close to ending this, do you really think you can walk away from this now?!
A Great Banquet...
Speak with Gordon

I must admit, I am very impressed with your determination and success in getting this far. Well... to reward your skill and cunning, I guess I owe you an explanation for all this... %% Give me a moment and I will tell you my tale... or slay me now, it matters little to me. My name is Derek and I have cared for this factory for over 40 years. %% Foolish old man that I am, I have nothing else but this factory. As you can see, I need this stick wherever I go. Quite hard to walk alone recently. %% Of course I'm not insane! Unless knowing and accepting your inevitable demise makes me crazy? Yes, I am an old man and so... it should come as no surprise that I will die soon. %% .....then why do these things? I just wanted to clear some unfinished business of mine. %% I do have a large fortune. But I don't have any friends or children... Well... it feels empty to pass away as I was. Nothing left. All alone. %% So I came up with an idea of giving my factory to some lucky boy or girl... someone I knew would care for it as I have. %% But who could I trust with my pride and joy? Why the true lovers of my factory, one of my factory's most valuable customers, of course! %% That's the way it should be done... don't you think? But I also wanted to exclude the greedy, spoilt or evil ones who are only interested in my money. %% So I came up with my, if I may say so, rather cunning plan. Only a child whose soul is still pure and white, far apart from evil spirit of Elga or Paris, could thrive in my factory... %% As you can see, all the workers in the factory are not human. Some would call them monsters... others attack them on sight... But to run my factory, you cannot fear them or they will never trust you. My plan... my horribly misguided plan... %% It was all a test. I needed transformation magic to test the children... to find one so pure, so brave... that they would not fear being a monster themselves and so could work with my other creations. %% But it is all my fault. I was in too much of a rush... not much time left... I didn't think it all through.%% I will pay for my bad sins. If any harm has come to any of the children, I wouldn't be able to live with myself. I will compensate them and their families for this horrible ordeal. %%
....I have nothing more to say... It is true that I did wrong thing. Do whatever you want with me.

(You pass on all the information Derek told you)%% So Derek was behind it all? Derek, the factory owner... masterminded this whole nefarious scheme... %% I can see results of his work... but how did he actually accomplish all this... I cannot punish him myself. Justice must be done... not vengeance.%% Well, I see. Anyway I have to tell this news to Guard Captain Colin immediately... I'm sure the parents of the kidnapped children will want to know too.

That's my story. I do not ask for your understanding.%% I only regret one thing.... The person I have been looking for... how long have I searched and you turn up right on my doorstep. Young, brave %class%. Now it is too late.... Right? %% Too bad....%% What are you gonna do with me now? It is your choice, I leave my fate in your hands... %% I will just stay here.
I've nothing left to say...
World without mercy
Clear Hero Mode

I think everyone will think the same as I do. No matter what his reasons were, we cannot forgive what he did to our children. I personally cannot understand his actions. %% Whether he felt his reasons were just or not, we cannot just release him after he kidnapped children!%% Sin is a sin. An arrest warrant has been issued for him. %% Go to the factory once again and make a citizens arrest on Derek, the cookie factory owner.
Please hurry, before some vigilante tries to end this!

Thanks to you, this case is closed completely... Still, I can't help but have bitter feelings about how this has all ended. Indeed, a final wish from an old, dying man is difficult to condemn... %% I pity him. No friends or family. I only can guess how he must feel. %% Understand young %class%... that friends come and go, but for the precious few we should hold on.%% And be nice to your siblings, they are the best link to your past and the people most likely to stick with you in the future. %% Otherwise you might become the next Derek... Haa.... but what do I know? %% I have to take a rest now. Too much work still to do! %% It's been a pleasure working with you, please look me up if you come across an interesting case like this again. I'd love to work with you again, in the future...%%
All you have to do is make Derek came out from the machine. Guards will take care of the rest. %% Please take care of yourself.
Hmm... Dont you want to see justice and finally close this case?
L. O. V. E!!
Balloon L
Balloon O
Balloon V
Balloon E
All the my love and passions for you~! L. O. V. E!!%% Hello~ I'm the manager of Cookie Factory Yamaki. What can I do for you~!
Are you jealous? Get the balloons quickly! You can do that~!
Oh~ you made it~! You deserve to get this. I'm willing to give this to you.

You are sick of loneliness this Valentine day too? This is for you~! Love Balloon~!%% You can get love balloon in this Cookie Factory~ The balloon of love~ L! O! V! E! it composed 4 alphabets.%% I whispered if you are in party with this balloon, you may get bonus EXP. You can express your love and get bonus EXP!!%% Voila! You the person who sick of loneliness! Would you just watching this?%% Let's get into the Cookie Factory! Get the all the balloons! I will give fascinating gifts
This is not the game anymore! The war! War!

CherryBlossom Event
Talk to Haruka
Hi, My name is Haruka, I own Haruka's Sushi Restaurant.%% Oh, I guess I should say, I 'did' own it... Actually, I got evicted from there a few days ago. sob..
Sob... Are you turning me down?

There's a special tea cup in my restaurant. It's a big tea cup which has been handed over as part of my heritage from a long time ago. I could brew delicious green tea by using it.%% One day, the Steel Chef suddenly came to my place and threatened me to get the tea cup.%% Of course I tried to keep it, but what can I do? I'm just a delicate, kind and weak woman.%% And also beautiful... Umm.. Excuse me.%% Anyway, the chef kicked me out to gratify his desire. I think he plans to take the tea cup and go somewhere else.%% Please help me, my hero!%% Without the tea cup, this poor woman won't be make her living. sob%%

There's a special tea cup in my restaurant. It's a big tea cup which has been handed over as part of my heritage from a long time ago. I could brew delicious green tea by using it.%% One day, the Steel Chef suddenly came to my place and threatened me to get the tea cup.%% Of course I tried to keep it, but what can I do? I'm just a delicate, kind and weak woman.%% And also beautiful...
Sob... Are you turning me down?
Key of Spring
Burnish iron wire
Piece of Intact Pendant
Glittering Jewel
Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaf

You need a key to get into the place, to find the tea cup. However, it broke when I struggled with the chef.%% The necklace made of Cherry Blossoms works as the key.. It can be made once again if you have the correct ingredients.%% It won't help me if I only get sushi restaurants back without the tea cup.%% My hero! Please help me to make my key once again!
The ingredients to make the pendant are 2 Burnish iron wires, 5 Pieces of Intact Pendants, 10 Glittering Jewels, and 20 Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaves.
Thank you. Please wait a minute. I'll make the necklace soon.

Will you help me? My hero! Thank you so much.%% The ingredients to make the pendant are 5 Burnish iron wires, 8 Pieces of Intact Pendants, 12 Glittering Jewels, 20 Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaves.%% Burnish iron wires, Pieces of Intact Pendants, Glittering Jewels and Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaves can obtained from Haruka's Sushi Restaurant Well, then, I will wait for your return.
Oh... you turn me down.. I hate you!!
No time to lose !
Defeat Steel Chef (Haruka's Sushi Restaurant Hero Mission)
Well, the necklace is ready.%% Please take this and go to {C=0xFF016295/}Haruka's Sushi Restaurant Hero Mission{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. There's entrance to get into the place for the tea cup.
It is Haruka's Sushi Restaurant Hero Mission. Please get the Steel Chef away form there !
Ah ! Thank you. Thank you so much !!! I won't forget your help.
The Steel Chef should be around for keeping the entrance safe. We cannot lose my heritage. Please get rid of him !%% There's no time left! Please!
Would that be hard for you?
Collect the secret scroll of Cherry Blossom

Oh my, I was so appreciated about last time. My village became back to be peaceful, thanks to your help. My restaurant is back in business, too. By the way, do you have time? If so, could you help me for a minute?
Well.... Not ready yet?

Wow, I knew it ! You're really great! That was quick! Then, I should work on making accessories!! Done ! It's new [Cherry Blossom Necklace]. I think we can get more The secret scroll of Cherry Blossom. If you bring more, I can make you different Cherry Blossom accessory.

Oh my gawd. I'm so pleased! Well, actually, there is a very old storage unit behind my restaurant. Last time I found an old letter when I went inside. And it said, 'there's a secret scroll of Cherry Blossom hidden somewhere in my restaurant.....' Evidently, The secret scroll of Cherry Blossom will show how to make a Cherry Blossom accessory. From my dad, I heard that someone who collects those types of accessories can use the secret skill of Cherry Blossom. You're the brave one who deserves to use the secret skill of Cherry Blossom. The secret scroll of Cherry Blossom will be hidden in {C=0xFF00863C/}[Haruka's Sushi restaurant] [Arcade Mode(F1)]'s{C=0xFF4D0D08/} somewhere. Please collect 4 secret scrolls of Cherry Blossom.
I see.... I'm sorry that you are not interested in the secret scroll of Cherry Blossom.
Well.... Not ready yet?
Searching for The secret scroll of Cherry Blossom(1/4)
Fresh Flavor
Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaf
My hero ! I really appreciated your help. I can make delicious green tea again. Well, can I ask one more thing if you don't mind?
Still gathering~?
Thank you so much! I think I can hang on for a few days with this. But I need more to gather 1-year amount. I'd like to request the same job tomorrow.

There's a secret in my house about brewing green tea. The secret of my delicious green tea is to make it with tea brewed through my family's tea cup and flavoured with Cherry Blossoms.%% To make its flavour, I need Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaf and Pure White Cherry Blossom Leaf.%% I used to gather those leaves for 1 year but I couldn't do it this time because I was kicked out by the chef. I'm still nervous that the chef is coming back again.%% Could you help me to gather the leaves? There are Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaves in Haruka's Sushi Restaurant [Arcade Mode(F1)]%% Please gather 40 Fresh Cherry Blossom Leaves!! I can give you some rewards for doing it.
My hero... I didn't ask your help for free. I'd provide you proper rewards for this..
White flavour

Talk with Amy

Wow~ %name% Please wait a minute~%% I just have been checking %name% and %name%'s pet regularly I think your pet would have reached to the step of growth now so I just want to know %name% pet's level. Is it okay?%%
There's no limitation of time so please come when you feel comfortable~ But, you should take care of them with love and sincerity.

Thank you. Wait a minute%% ........%% ..............%% Wow, your pet has reached to level 20. I think your pet is growing up way faster than my expectation.%% Pet which has more than level 20 will take a condition to be grown up. Ah, maybe you don't know? do you?%% Pet will be grown up if they have reached to level 20.%% Yes.. they must be more reliable. Moreover they can use variety skills.%% Through this item what I got, so called Crystal of Metamorphosis.%% %name%'s pet has grown up like this, you spent a lot of time to take care of your pet.%%

There's no limitation of time so please come when you feel comfortable~ But, you should take care of them with love and sincerity.
Okay~ Here is Crystal of Revolution%% I'm exciting to see how much your pet stronger than now~!%%
Are you ready?%% Are you getting nervous now~?
You seems like not to be ready~ Okay. If you want to get this Crystal of Revolution, please contact me whenever you feel free, Okay?

Tough Sheepskin

A lot of monsters are roaming around town these days. It's mysterious but at least it has increased the demand for armour.%% I don't know whether to be happy or sad because either way I'm short-handed over here. So I was thinking...%% Can you get me some {C=0xFF016295/}Tough Sheepskin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Orders for Leather Armour are pouring in and I'm about to run out of supplies.%% If you help me out, I'll gladly make you some leather armour too! Fair enough?
Do you have the hard leather I asked for? I heard it's quite difficult to get... Please let me know when you get your hands on some.
You got them all already? As promised, here's your leather armour.%% I'll be asking for your help again soon enough but I'm ok for the moment. Thank you and goodbye.

There are some vicious {C=0xFF016295/}Sheep{C=0xFF4D0D08/} wandering not too far from here.%% I'm sure they'll drop what you're looking for. I don't think I need too many for now. {C=0xFF016295/}5 Tough Sheepskin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} ought to do it. I'll be waiting!

Slacking Soldiers (1)
Repairing Guppy's Armour

What do you need? Ah... My armour? I haven't maintained my armour for such a long time, and it's all rusty now!%% We were on a wolf hunt some time ago, and I damaged my armour in the process. I was severely reprimanded by Captain Dustin...%% I need to have it repaired, but Dustin won't let me go anywhere now.%% Can you give this armour to Darwin, the Blacksmith? He will repair it for me.

You're not done yet? Just go right and find {C=0xFF016295/}Darwin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Click 'Repair', place {C=0xFF016295/}'Guppy's Armour' in the window then click 'Repair' once again.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!%% I don't feel comfortable without my armour... Hurry up!

Thank you! Is this really my armour? It looks better than my old one.%% Haha, thanks again! Oh, this is what I owe you. I included the money you used for repairing my armour. %class%, you should repair yours as well.

Thank you, %class%. Let me teach you how to repair it.%% First, talk to Darwin then click {C=0xFF016295/}'Repair'.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% After that, place 'Guppy's Armour' in the window and click 'Repair' once again. That's it! Piece of cake, right?
What? You lost my equipment??... Oh no..... It's fine... Just hurry up and retrieve it. Please be careful this time.
Oh come on, you've got to help me out!
[Event Monster] Leaves
[Event Monster] Leaf

I always make [Event Monster] and sell them at Dan-oh Festival. But this year, I'm having a tough time.%% Because all the monsters around the village has taken all the [Event Monster] Leaves%% You, the adventurer seem like the %class% .. could you do this favor and get [Event Monster] Leaves? I shall give you just compensation for your troubles.
How much longer should I be waiting? Can't you hurry up? Aren't you going to do this or not?

Oh!! [Event Monster] Leaves!! Thank you so much. Now I can do the work of making the [Event Monster].%% Like I have promised you, I shall express my gratitude through this gift. Enjoy your Dan-oh Festival.

Thank you. Their characteristic is that they cover their bodies with [Event Monster]. They have their own forms so it will be easy for you to recognize them.%% They also usually appear in Windia Plains Mission Map so please kill them and bring the leaves for me.
Hang it all! If you don't want it, fine. Just forget about it.
Four-legged Son
Deliver the Wine to Parker

Ohh no...this isn't good, not good at all. I'm worried about my youngest but I'm worried sick about Lylia. Oh, %class%. What a great timing. I have an urgent favor to ask of you. My five youngest puppies have been kidnapped by wolves. They are puppies that my eldest son have given me...what am I to do?%%You see, the two sons have all grown up and went on their ways so I was always quite lonely. My son must have sensed my loneliness and gave me five puppies but they have been kidnapped by wolves. Lylia was taken with them as well. Will you please tell this to Scout Agent Parker?
I am also concerned about my youngest but Lylia is in danger so please hurry.

Hmm...I'm sure that there would be a road here somewhere! Eh? Who are you? What?! Lylia was seen? By someone who seems like a doctor?! Huh...it cannot be that person...Ok! Thanks for the information. I'll look for Pamela's dog as well.%% And to help your work I can give you an Odelia Return Scroll. Use it and you can go to Odelia at once. You can also buy more from Trade merchant Huerin.

I can't spare any moment longer. Lylia was kidnapped by someone who was wearing a white gown who seemed like a doctor. And this Doctor wanted to push Lylia away but she clung on to him and asking him to give Silver back.
This is Scout Agent Parker. Do you have any task you need to get done?
Lylia's life could be in danger. Please don't deny my request.
Old Playmate Sen (1)
Meet Tools Merchant Sen

%class%, I am worried, listen! I have an old playmate named Sen and he lives in Advanced Windia Plains. But...%% With the hostile monsters around there, villagers are too afraid to leave the village now. I can't find him anywhere and I'm so worried.%% Could you please go to Advanced Windia Plains and find him for me?
Any news about Sen? I hope he's safe.
Uh... Help! Help me! Yes, I am Sen, I am Sen! How do you know me?
Thank you. Sen is in the Advanced Windia Plains. He's a really good friend of mine. Please make sure he's safe.
Wow! Since when are there so many monsters in this place?
Ah, you must be busy, right? I hope you will accept my request, even if it's later.

Ash Wolf

Odelia Return Scroll

%name%, thank you for slaying those wolves and spiders. There's fewer around now, but I'm so afraid that they'll return.%% They drive me crazy! Don't look at me like that... Thank you. Please bring me that Return Scroll quickly! I'll be counting on you.
Don't be cold, and please grant my request.
Woodi Revolt

Oh %class%, will you listen to me?%% We have this plot of land that my family has been farming on for years at {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I've been hearing some strange noises of late and one night I went out to see what it was. Turns out those pesky {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are trashing the place! %% Do you think you could take care of those annoying {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

Thank you! My farm is located at {C=0xFF016295/}Empty Pumpkin Garden (Mission Map){C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% It's really easy to find with all those {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} trotting around the place. Dispatch 10 {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and I will compensate you for the trouble.
Well, of course. This task isn't easy. Farewell.
Woodies sometimes come in handy

We meet again. How have you've been? Is everything alright? *sigh* With monsters roaming outside the village of late, lots of people are asking for healing potions.%% That's why I'm so busy right now.%% I've ran out of ingredients and I'm really glad to see you.%% You know why? Because I know that you will do me a favour, right?%% Normally, I'd do this myself, but I just don't have the time. Would you mind getting {C=0xFF016295/}Leaflets{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me?%% You can find {C=0xFF016295/}Leaflets{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Maples{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Advanced Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I'm sorry but would it be possible for you to hurry along now? I mean, since you've already agreed and all.%%There are reservations lined up. Please don't feel bad, alright?
Wow! I can't believe you gathered them this quick %name%! You're wonderful!

Thanks! You'll be well compensated.%% I need 5 Leaflets. That shouldn't be too tough. You can find them from {C=0xFF016295/}Maples{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Advanced Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I'll be waiting for you, {C=0xFF016295/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
No? How could you be so harsh... I'm so offended! Fine! I won't ask you again! Goodbye and don't come back!
Love Potion

Hi! My name is Daisy. You want to join the Dragon Fellowship right? Yes, I knew it! That's the same reason why I'm here too!%% I can supply potions to trainers, it'll help them out a lot! Haha... I have bags full of coins already!%% However, I need more Mane to brew potions. You can get those from the Ember Wolves that live around here...%% Can you help me gather some Mane? Thorn Leaf (Greenie)

I don't fight well so do you think you can do this for me one more time?%%I mean, if you're not busy that is.

Wow! Thanks a lot! {C=0xFF016295/}Greenies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} should roam around the {C=0xFF016295/}Mission Map of Advanced Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Gather {C=0xFF016295/}5 Thorn Leaves{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and be careful of them, alright? They're rough!
Ah, %name%! You are back again.%% I guess you want to help me with the Mane collection again right? Riiiiight?
