Advice of the Great Magician
Talk to Pablo

Ah...so you re back at last. A while ago, I saw Pamela's puppies escape safely. I guess they really missed their mother. They were running off with their cute tails shaking behind them.%% I guess you have safely completed this mission. I heard that Great Magician is in our town of Odelia. Why don't you ask him for advice?
Arcanist Pablo is at Odelia. Go ahead and find him.

What?! Did I actually hear this right...I think that someone you told me...is very similar to the person that I know...but I refuse to believe that person did such a thing...perhaps this fellow went on to the path of darkness after failing in the mission with me...alright. I shall investigate about this myself.
Arcanist Pablo is the greatest magician in all of the Continent of the Wind. He is in Odelia right now so do pay him a visit.%%Use Odelia Return Scroll to teleport to the village at once.
He is a great magician. It would be good for you to ask for his advice...
Deliver a letter to Rudolph at Traitor's Ridge

My youngest son is too far away to visit but...%% It's bearable thanks to my oldest lad, {C=0xFF016295/}Rudolph{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I used to visit him a lot in {C=0xFF016295/}Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} but with everything that's going on around there, I can't even imagine stepping one foot.%% Speaking of which, do you think you can help an old lady out?
Ah... Please hurry. My son is waiting.

Welcome! My name is Rudolph.%% Why am I here you ask? Well, I'm here to serve free beer for Thomas and the soldiers who are working really hard protecting our continent.%% Can I get you a beer or something?%% What's this? This is a letter from my mother. How did her letter get into your hands?%% Now I see %class%, you were sent by my mum. I was just thinking about her. Thank you!
Thank you. My son lives at {C=0xFF016295/}Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please deliver this letter to {C=0xFF016295/}Rudolph{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Oh dear... I don't think you should be losing the letter like that. Here you go. Take care.
What's the matter? Here to drink some more wine?
Please reconsider? It would definitely break an old lady's heart.
Warning! Destruction of the Village!

Whew... That smell! Can you smell that? The village reeks!%% And it's all because of the clogged toilets!%% A plumber usually comes around once a week but with all the monsters roaming around, he chickened out...%% I figure we should at least try to solve the problem ourselves.%% I've heard that Plunger Raccoons in {C=0xFF016295/}Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFF016295/}Canyon of Oblivion{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have plungers...%% %class%, can you help?
You're still here? Take a whiff.%% This odour will kill us all! Please save the village!
You got all 10 Plungers! Thank you. %% I should hurry and give them out to the villagers. Farewell!
Thank you! We only need 10 Plungers. We'll be really grateful If you can get them. Please do this for us.
What? Then what can we do about this smell? The solution to this problem lies on you. Please think about it first.
Road of Meetings
F1 - Defeat Sanka

My mother said that she'll be at {C=0xFF016295/}F1 Mission Map in Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm glad that I will finally see her but I'm worried about the rumours of monsters lurking around that area.%%I know you've done so much for us already but could you please {C=0xFF016295/}defeat Sanka{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the F1 Mission Map at Traitor's Ridge, so my mother can make safe passage?{C=0xFF4D0D08/} lurking there so my mother can traverse safely?
Not leaving yet? You haven't gone to the {C=0xFF016295/}F1 Mission Map in Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} yet? Time is running out... Please hurry.

Wow! You got rid of them all? You think I can go and see my mother now?%% Thank you so much! Oh yeah, this is something very dear to me but I'll hand it over to you.%% I'll never forget what you've done for me.
Wow, really? If you could slay Sanka {C=0xFF016295/}Rumoured Forest (Mission Map) in Traitor's Ridge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} then she should be able to traverse safely.
Is it really that hard? Could you please reconsider?
Hunting Season (1)

How's your stay at Traitor's Ridge so far? By the way, raccoons reside in this area as well.%% Those ill-natured raccoons will stop at nothing and attack anyone who's taller than them, that's why travellers are afraid to wander around here.%% Can you slay {C=0xFF016295/}10 Raccoons{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me? It will help Odelia and Port of the Winds immensely.
Did you slay those ill-natured raccoons? I can't reward you otherwise.
You're very courageous! Thank you.
Thank you. Wish you all the best.
You must traverse this place to reach Port of the Winds. Please reconsider.
Hunting Season (2)
Raccoon Tail
Bat Wing

Those pesky Raccoons are getting more and more aggressive by the day! Slaying some of them wasn't enough to drive them off.%% And now we've got Scrappies attacking the travellers as well! Please help us one more time.
We've got plenty of people lying about their kills for the bounty. You need to show me some proof!
Thank you. The canyon is much safer for travellers now.
Kill Scrappies and Raccoons at Traitor's Ridge. Bring me 7 Raccoon Tails and 7 Bat Wings as proof.
Bothersome? Just think of all the travellers that will benefit from it. Let me know if you change your mind.
Hunting Season (3)

What do you think of my name? Does it sound like a dog's name to you? To be honest, I find my name funny.%% But do you know what's funnier than my name? Axels - They walk funny because they're fat and sometimes they run away leaving their food behind.%% Can you slay some of them for me?
Get moving!
You've helped me out so much.
Slay 10 Axels at Traitor's Ridge.
Axels may look hilariously clumsy, but they're more dangerous than Scrappies and Raccoons.
Hunting Season (4)
Torn Belt

I have a problem... I hope you could help me.%% It's this girl, Sofia, a banker from Port of the Winds. I don't know why, but I feel like an invisible man in front of her.%% She's so beautiful, and has lots of admirers. Competition is tough so I wish to know what are her interests and all.%% Rumours say that you can craft a mirror that will reveal a person's inner thoughts from Torn Belts of Axels. Can you collect them for me?
I'm too anxious to sleep. Please hurry.
Thank you. Now, I can make the mirror. I'm one step closer to Sofia.
Please bring me 20 Torn Belts from Changos.
W-What? How can I pursue Sofia now?
Hunting Season (5)
Deliver letter to Sofia

I made the mirror from those belts you brought me and asked this question - Who is the woman that loved me the most?%% I felt sad because Sofia didn't show up and I refuse to believe that. I asked her out on a date, but she refused. As a last resort, I wrote her a letter.%% Please deliver it to Sofia.
You haven't delivered my letter yet?
Ah, a letter from Guppy. Thank you for your effort, but I am not interested.
Just give the letter to her. If she likes me then she'll ask about me.
Welcome, do you need anything from me?
You turn me down even though I've got a broken heart...
Power Challenge
Starving Brown Wolf

Do you think that you have what it takes to become a member of the Dragon Fellowship?%%Ah, I'm not really doubting you but I am asking because I want to help you.%%Yes, I know. You have saved my daughter, got rid of the wolves and many other things.%%But I am not sure if this would qualify you as member of the Dragon Fellowship just yet.%%Could you show me how well you can fight?%%If you will prove yourself, I shall give you my support when you sign up for application to Dragon Fellowship!
Go on and show us your power.
Congratulations. Since you have passed the challenge that test your powers, I shall give you a really useful item.

Alright, I shall recognize your powers if you would capture {C=0xFF016295/}20 Starving Brown Wolves, 20 Maples, 20 Greenies {C=0xFF4D0D08/} living in the Advanced Windia Plains and Advanced Windia Plains Mission Map%%
I think that you don't really trust yourself yet. Alright, take on this challenge when you have the power.
The history of the Udaka bandits
Pinkerton (Howling Wind's Hill)
Chango (Howling Wind's Hill)
Axel (Howling Wind's Hill)

This is just ridiculous. Look at this poor security here! You know, although Sanka and Kunka brothers were bandits, they did a great job after Colin changed them... Now they're more destructive than ever..%% Since I know Sanka I'm going to try to talk some sense into him. You think you can defeat the monsters at {C=0xFF016295/}Howling Wind's Hill{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the mean time? That used to be their home. but it's odd that they are apart now. If I fail, I will investigate this myself.
Alright we'll meet back here after our jobs are done!

Argh.. Sanka..he's not the Sanka I used to know. I helped Colin fight with the Udaka, and they fought well and hard.%% Sanka and Kunka respected strength. that's probably why they liked Colin. So they had promised that they'd go straight and do good work. And they actually did some good work, not to mention some important duties as well. But the Sanka I met today is not the Sanka I know. something is seriously wrong here

From what I've gathered so far, there are {C=0xFF016295/}Pinkertons, Changos and Axels{C=0xFF4D0D08/} left on the Howling Wind's Hill, So defeat at least {C=0xFF016295/}5 of each{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and I should be able to pickup by myself from there. Alright be careful and be strong.
This is not the one you refuse.
Suspicious Apple
Suspicious Apple

Although I am injured, my mercenary pride did not permit me to rest easy. So I investigated the area Kunka is at, which is the Canyon of Oblivion. While I was there, I found a apple on the ground. Primo, nearby, asked if he could have it. And you know what happened when he tasted it?%% He frowned and said it tasted really funny. I think he used the words nasty? And you know he's not one to complain about taste usually. I think this might be worth investigating. check out Howling Wind's Hill and see if there's more of those {C=0xFF016295/}suspicious apples{C=0xFF4D0D08/} lying around. If not on the ground maybe the monsters are carrying it.
I'll see you back here after you're successful.

Ah..I see you've brought some back. Just as I thought these apples are in Howling Wind's Hill as well. You they look like normal apples too. Right! so being the brave merc that I am, I going to just slice a piece off and taste it like so...Ahk! Huh!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!%% Where..where am I?.. Who am I?.. You...you're a human! Argh! Ahh...my head...wha...what did I just do? Well it's a good thing that you brought many, we're going to have to investigate this further. The honorable doctor Farrell should be able to figure this our for us..
A merc's instincts are never wrong! Those apples have something to do with this matter. Try to get me {C=0xFF016295/}5 of those suspicious apples{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from Howling Wind's Hill.
You don't want to refuse something like this
Old habits die hard

Just as the saying goes, old habits die hard. As the guard of Odelia, I knew this was going to happen. How, you ask? Because we're up against the evil Udaka Bandits, that how.%% They were just fooling us all along. They seemed to be working for our security, and volunteered to administer the tests for the Fellowship of the Dragon, In the end, they were just bandits. Especially {C=0xFF016295/}Chango and Axel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} of {C=0xFF016295/}Howling Wind's Hill{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, they are just the worst. Please get them back for this.
Please be careful.

Being just a guard, it would be suicidal for me to go up against the Udaka bandits, but I can see that it's different for a %class% like yourself. You know what? Back then when Colin was defeating them, I said not to give them a second chance I did..

It would help the security of this area a lot if you can defeat at least 5 each of {C=0xFF016295/}Changos and Axels{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. They became violent after all this time. I guess they were just afraid of someone Stronger like Colin all this time, instead of becoming good.
I'm just a guard..I'm really not qualified for this task.
Evidence of cruelty!
Raccoon Corpse
Plunger Raccoon Corpse
Pinkerton Corpse(Howling Wind's Hill)

Thomas seems to think that they changed because of some other reason, But I think we need some kind of proof that they only acted as if they had changed. I think if you can hunt down some of those Raccoons that are restricted from hunting.%% Since they couldn't hurt humans under Colin's watch, I'm sure they went after the Raccoons. Evil is evil! We can get the proof.
Please be careful.

Are those Raccoons in the purple bag? You know, I'm not a scientist, But there should be a clear sign of their cruelty if.. Hmm...what? I..I can't believe it! There is no marks! Why did they even restrict it if they weren't going to hurt them?

Hmm... I think perhaps {C=0xFF016295/}8 Pinkertons{C=0xFF4D0D08/} should be sufficient for the job. The Raccoon corpse may get damaged when you're bringing them here, so put them in a bag. Of course the damage from the fight with you, the %class%, won't matter too much.
I'm just a guard..I'm really not qualified for this task.
Peculiar Fishing Material
Bat Nose

This kind of recession is terrible for a boatman like me. I think I might be better off making a living as a fisherman.%% Did you know that by using {C=0xFF016295/}Scrappy Nose{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as bait, you can catch a tremendous amount of fish?%% I'll be a great fisherman, you see! If you're not too busy, do you think you can help me out? I assure you it won't be a waste of your time.
This isn't enough, haha... Don't fool around! Come back when you're done with my request, haha.
Great! You've got them all! With this bait, I'm sure I'll be able to catch at least a hundred big ones!%% Please accept this reward. Thank you. I'll see you around.
Thanks. Hang around {C=0xFF016295/}Traitor's Ridge or Canyon of Oblivion{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and you'll find the {C=0xFF016295/}10 Scrappy Nose{C=0xFF4D0D08/} I need.%% I'll be waiting for you.

I see you're busy. It's better if I ask somebody else for help.%% Why are you even listening to me when you aren't up for the task? You pulled a fast one on me! Goodbye! Hahaha... (Freak!)%% Ah? What do you mean? I didn't say anything, haha!
Bandits in the end!
Ogre Shaman
Ferocious Chango

Curing the Cold!

I have clients who are worried about their pets catching colds. Pets used to be resilient to the cold, but I guess being pampered by humans has weakened them.%%The only thing I can do is brew medicine for them. Can you go get the items on this list? You'll be helping the pets out and we would be ever so grateful.
Some pets are sick. Obtain ingredients for a cure from the 4 star Traitor's Ridge Mission Map.
Thank you for collecting them all. This helps a lot!
I knew you would help me. Mushrooms can be used to prepare an excellent medicine for pets. You can find mushrooms from the Raccoons in the 4 star Mission Map of Traitor's Ridge.
Our poor pets are ill, can you please reconsider?

Getting the Character Card (1)
Meet Don Morgan of Odelia Village

Hello, %class%.%% I have a great news for %class% like you. Would you care to listen?%% Ah, this is all about the Character Card that we are giving out in the Port of the Winds.%% You see, this Character Card is a card with which you can register your personal information for others to know more about you.%% Don't you see why you need this? Well, so that everyone can see how great of a %class% you are, you can share information with people you want to befriend,%% Most importantly, this can be something you can make yourself attractive to someone you are interested in!%% How about it? I can give you the character card after following few simple procedures. Would you care to join this event?
Please hurry back here. It's a bit confusing because there are many applicants.
This is great since you came on time. Now we should take the second step so could you wait for just a moment longer?

Alright. I shall tell you all about the procedure of getting the card. Go to Port of the Wind and meet Butler Vincent.%%This card cannot be given out to just anyone so we do require the minimal personal information. %% Here! I'll give you this paper so get the signature of Town Chief Don Morgan.%% Get back to me.

Huh? What brings you here? Ah, weren't you in the Port of the Winds? What business do you have in this place?%%{C=0xFF4400BB/}(Explain to Don Morgan about the character card.)%% Hmm, character card......Ok. Here you go!%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}(Don Morgan signs the application for character card.)%% Is this what you needed? Ho ho ho.. I wish you the best of luck.
Oh, is that so? That's too bad. It's being given out for free...
Torn Deed
Torn Deed

I have just found out that Equipment Merchant Crispin has been defrauded by Cork, a fellow real estate agent who used to work here in the Port.%% Crispin was so upset over it, he tore the deed of his house... He must have really been mad. Tearing the deed is not going to resolve anything.%% People around town have been giving me strange looks since it happened, I think they resent me because I'm a real estate agent too. I'd never try to defraud any of my customers! I feel so bad for Crispin.%% Cork has disappeared, I think it's up to me to help Crispin out, you'll help too, won't you?
Please reconsider, for the good of Crispin and my reputation.
You came through! I knew you would, haha!! Thank you!!

Crispin tore the deed and threw the pieces into a ship heading over to Bearded Whale Coast.%% I'm certain that if you go to the Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode(F1)(F2)] and break open whatever cargo boxes you see lying around you'll get the pieces of the deed. Collect those torn pieces so I can put it back together.

The fairest at Port of the Winds
Deliver Survey to Jeremy - the Great Wiseman
Deliver Survey to Davy - the Blacksmith
Deliver Survey to Daisy - the General Merchant
Deliver Survey to Rony - the Archer Superior
Deliver Survey to Crispin - the Equipment Merchant

Greetings! If you are not too busy, will you hear me out? Hmmm... A mercenary like me values each day because it could be our last.%% I have this hobby... And that is to find out who among the ladies in thistown is the fairest.%% I need to do some research first... If I may ask you, who do you think it is? I would like to distribute this survey to the townspeople to hear their opinion. Will you help me?
Why haven't you given them out yet? I could be killed before my research is complete.
Thank you. This is the news I've been waiting for. Now, I can charge the field of battle without hesitation. Thank you very much!
Hey! Don't look at me like that. Anyway, here's the survey. Give it out to the villagers!
Is the report done? Oh, guess not!
Who do I think is the prettiest? Well, it's definitely Cindy, haha!%% That arrogance, that body and the way she tussles her hair... Aaaah, brings me back to my younger days.

Huh? What do you need? Prettiest woman in town? Well, of course, that's me!%% I won first place in a beauty contest among the Jukombe tribe, not that I want to show off or something.%% Huh? I need to exclude myself? Okay, then who else?%% Cindy? I think she qualifies. The others don't stand a chance against me, apart from her. Hoho!%% Hey, where are you going? Is that all? You don't want to shop? Hey!

What do you need? What? Hmmm... That's a tough question. I only have eyes for my wife. Do you want to see a picture of her?%% Oops! This is Cindy's picture.%% Ahaha...%% She dropped this picture... I was going to give this back to her actually... It's not what you think... Hahaha.

Oh~ hello? %% You have something to say to me? Tell me~.%% Huh?%% Prettiest woman in Town? Hahaha! You don't look like the type to actively pursue women, but I guess you are a man too. Why do you want to know though?%% You're still too young for this, got it?!%% Well. I have to answer anyway. I don't know about now, but Cyndi used to be a killer beauty.%% She's the only one who's declined my advances as well.%% So I'll give my vote to Cyndi!%% Good? Anything else to ask?
Oh... I didn't know you would refuse. What a pity!
You wish to enchant your weapon? Huh? Who is the prettiest woman in town? What's this about all of a sudden?%% Well, I'd say it's Cindy for sure! Who else can it be?

I'll wait here, please stop her!

Talk to Jess
Umm... I should let you do one mission as a member of the Dragon Fellowship. Will you hear me out?
A seagull that stole Dr. Farrell's diary went to Bearded Whale Coast. Let's go to that place and ask them if they saw a seagull that had something in its mouth!

hmm? Seagull ? You're looking for a seagull that flew off with a book? I have no idea what you're talking about. So what kind Seagulls exactly are you looking for?%% Hmm... so you're saying that the Seagull took the book containing important information right at the moment Guard Captain Colin got the book?!%% As far as I know, there's only one seagull famous for stealing things..

A diary and a structural drawing of monster... ... Huh? Did you feed a seagull? Nah... I just disturbed that seagull.%% Anyway, I will give you this diary and drawing. So, the thing what you have to do is that...%% What the~!! Why is this seagull is coming up like this?? Huh??%% Hey, where's Dr. Farrell's diary? Ah?! Seagull!!! ........... What a silly mistake...!!%% Let's chase that damn bird!! I think it went to Bearded Whale Coast! We don't have much time!! Let's find that seagull!! If we lose it, we should find someone who saw it!%% Dr. Farrell's diary is very important so let's go !!
We don't have enough time! If we lose Dr. Farrell's diary, everything is done!
Jess' information!
Talk to Colin.
His name is Albert and aparrently he's very good at picking peoples pockets too. He was even featured in the magazine, 'Monthly Thief'. Urm.. Who was the seagull's master... I'm trying to remember...
I think you gotta go to Colin?
Oh! Did you find that seagull? Great. So where's that diary? What? That seagull is Hookah's seagull?%% Ah... we got another problem.

umm hmm.... Albert... let's see... what did he look like urm... he was a really big seagull that could lift a shark.... Oh yes! He is a Pirare Shark's Pet!%% That's right, Captain Hookah! He's the owner. If this seagull is like you explained, he must be at Captain Hookah's place. That seagull is well trained, Captain Hookah might have been looking for the book...%% Hey! where are you going! you should pay for this!
Uh-Oh, maybe you don't need that information? Which seagull is the right one?
Slay the pirates Captain!
Slay Captain Hookah (Scenario mode at the Bearded Whale Coast)
We don't have many options. I would like to get you to do this for me, can you do it?
Mission's Scenario mode at the Bearded Whale Coast! Don't forget!
Oh! Did you find that diary? Well, where's the diary?! Show me.%% What? Nothing? How come? What? Captain Hookah has handed over Dr. Farrell's diary to Alvida?

Let's get in Captain Hookahs Villa and get Dr. Farrell's diary! According to our information, Captain Hookahs Villa is at the Bearded Whale Coast. You can get in to Captain Hookahs Villa through Scenario mode, in the mission map.
Do you know what the situation is?
Another chase!
Contact Sijin (Steven Trading Port)
Crap! Alvida this time? What a dirty pirate!!! How did they know we had the diary?
He would be in near the Steven Trading Port's mission. So meet him and get some information from him!

Shi! I'm watching the pirates right here. Why did you come here?%% What!!! Now the Dragon Fellowship is coming here??!! No way!!! I need them to stop!!!%% This is a trap!!!!!! There is a massive amount of bombs around here!

Well, okay we should really make them pay this time.. I gotta make a 2nd squad, I'll follow on your tail soon. So meet him and get some information from him!

Dr. Farrell's diary.
Bomb disarming.
We don't have time to explain! Just a moment ago, Hookah's seagull came here with mail. And suddenly Alvida was placing bombs around here! I didn't know why but now I know!
Scenario's mission in the Steven Trading Port! Alvida placed a huge amount of bombs there too!
Sigh... we were lucky.. We're were almost in trouble there!

Alvida wants to walk the Dragon Fellowship into a trap!!%% How did Alvida lure the Dragon Fellowship?%% What? Alvida has {C=0xFFFF0000/}Dr. Farrell's diary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!? So entire the Dragon Fellowship comes up? What is that diary!?%% What? that's not a big deal. Talk to Colin.
Oh! Did you bring back that diary? If all member of the Dragon Fellowship went there, it must be important!
Please report it to Colin.
Oh! Welcome back. Finally we've done a ceremony for the battle and we're about to go. Well, did you meet Sijin?
It's good to hear that you finally brought back that diary! Then please report to Colin. I'll keep watching this scum.
..! Sorry... please come again?

For the new journey
Meet Larell at the Moonlight Shore Village.

After we slayed the pirate Alvida, most of big issues in Port of the Winds have been wrapped up. Especially your contribution and service, that was crucial for our mission. Now we are going to chase Paris and that's going to be our primary reason for being.
Moonlight Shore Village is just right next of Kalygon Fleet.
You got the sign of the Dragon Fellowship, so you must be Dragon Fellowship. Why did you come to me?%% What's that? What? Decode it?

The Black Witch that the pirates mentioned should be Paris. If she hired pirates to get that diary, there must be a reason.%% So, I tried to look at that diary but everything is encoded. This is order! You should go to {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary!{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Find {C=0xFF016295/}Jess, the thief{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to bring me the Artis' Treasure as soon as possible!
Hurry and go! This is urgent!

Oh~ I see you here again. I have a favor to ask you~ what a nice timing. Huh? Evan ask you to tell me to bring Artis' Treasure as soon as possible? Haha~ Actually the favor I need to ask you is related to that.

Then also tell him this! The ghost who are dead thousand years ago appear around not just Mirinae Sanctuary but also Skippy Sanctuary, and if the problem there is solved under other superior officers order%% Then that blocks my way to be a captain! Hey~ you came back~! Of course! You cleared mission without any problems, right? Stupid Evan! He make us do his work, and in his place, we need to go through all these. Oh well~ still we can get the recommendation letter for the Fellowship of Dragon, hahaha!
Of course~! I knew you would do it for me. Me, the Ace Jess, and Jack with brain, finally %name% the strong one, if we put our strength together, our future is bright. Sure! Of course!
Now! Close your eyes and imagine! You with 120 soldiers under you!

So we concluded that we cannot stay put and reinvestigating the whole thing.%% I heard this interesting piece of information that there is another secret place at the filming location but it can only be entered through solving the riddles.%% When you will achieve certain ranks successively, this secret door will open...%% If whether this is true...or false hasn't been fully investigated yet..%% But if this really is true, we will discover new facts that we didn't know about.

Fatal Ending
Stop Master Jun

Urgh...urgghh!!%% Wa,wait. Hold it right there.%% I didn't kill Billy!! This is a big misunderstanding! It is a misunderstanding, I tell you! I am innocent!%% Do, do calm down....listen to me, please. If you listen to what I have to say....you will find out about the truth! (please stop hitting me....)%% Whe,where should I start? Ri,right!! I am also deeply sorry that Billy had to leave us so soon.%% What would I gain by killing Billy?%% He is the only real action hero in this continent! He is the best action hero who never uses body doubles or extras.%% With Billy, I never had to hire other stuntmen. He does everything by himself. Billy was my true treasure.%% Do you know the astronomical amount of money I had to spend to get Billy? %% I have no reason to kill Billy!%% Billy was murdered by no one other than Jun!! It was Jun!!%% I know why he did something like this!%% Few years ago, I was developing my ideas for the movie. I was also looking for the main character for my movie.%% That's when I met Billy and Jun. And I had to make my decision on who will have the leading role in the movie.%% I was deep in dilemma. They were equally good in martial arts and acting abilities but I had only one leading role so I had to think it over very carefully.%% I had to audition with them for a month. It was hard to see who was better in terms of their abilities but I chose Billy.%% Why? because it was Billy's humane qualities. He was very humble and kind to everyone.%% He accepted every criticism with grain of salt, knew what he wasn't good at and admitted it, and he was also getting fully into his character. But Jun...he was different.%% Humble my ass! He didn't have the most common courtesy! He beat his manager up and when didn't like what he saw on the script, he refused to act.%% This is why I chose Billy and Jun cursed me and shouted that he will have his revenge when he left the studio.%% After a while Billy ended up dead! Jun! That punk! He finally messed up big time!%%When Billy was sleeping, he injected animal tranquilizer to his body and ran off! Our employee is the witness. I sent the employee away since Jun might have his revenge on him as well.%% And I had to be in jail for a while since I took the fall. I was in jail for a year and got acquitted and things didn't go as Jun has planned.%% Jun was afraid that I was out of jail so he started collecting evidence against me. This is when he started using you!%% So you must not believe him! Can't you trust me? If so, go into this portal.
Hey, I know that Jun is very strong but you can't be idle around here. Get moving.

Did you really beat Jun up? Ha ha ha ha!! Thank you...thank you so much!%% I shall let Colin take charge of this guy!!%% When we inspect all the things that he has on him, he shall surely be charged guilty!! This is for you! This was something that I wanted to give to Billy........%% But since he is not with us......you take this! This has his soul in it! I hope that you will put this to good use.

He is a fearsome martial expert. But someone has to stop his next move...%% If you can't stop Jun, next target would be me. Don't you think that you have the obligation to stop another murder from happening..?%% Please stop him before it's too late!
He,hey, couldn't you please press the Accept button and save the life of a fellow human being?
For Whom the Battle Rages On

We have succeeded because you caught Jun...I think that not all the problems have been solved.%% Jun had too much shock that he killed a friend so he is in denial that he killed Billy.%% He still thinks ....that Marv killed Billy. He seems to be in severe mental shock.%% That's why Jun is locked in a solitary cell. We are giving him various shock therapies, medicines and other treatments.%% Now he is in the film location where he committed murder and receiving treatments. I guess you could say that we are trying to connect him to the memory through the film location where he killed Billy.%% In other words, it is stimulating his memory and making it come back...a shock therapy of sorts. It could be cruel, I suppose. No, it is only just. %% We have to separate human and their sins. If he gets back to normal, he can pay for what he did. So before he gets back to the normal state, he is still a mental patient.%% Hmm..I was thinking that you can do something for us.%% Could you infiltrate the filming location and contact him?%% There is no one who can stand up to him. It's only you.%% You can do anything to him.....ah right. You could challenge him to a duel if that is your style. Just give him some kind of shock.%% I think that Jun is very confused but if someone could shock him, I think that he can change. %% I think this is for the best. Can you do it?
You haven't gone on your way yet? Time is not on your side.
I heard that you confronted him face to face. It seems that his illness is gradually improving.%% You are the person that can be fully trusted. You did a great job.
Alright. That's what you should do.%% Infiltration method is same as before. In order to infiltrate into the filming location, you should get SSS Rank for all the missions.
If you don't want to do this, there's nothing I can do about it. Since it is not an easy task...and considering your past achievements...I won't blame you or anything.

Another Kidnapping
Jelly's Bell

Ah ah...I am in big trouble..my pet...my pet..sob. Joyce Pirates have robbed the house of the pets. Jellys came out flooding from the pirate ship and kidnapped our pets, tucking them away into their bells! Can you retrieve our pets?
Please hurry. I can't make the pets sick.

Ah...I see that there are twenty all together. Sage Jeremy will get my pets out from Jelly's Bells. Thank you. So this makes perfect sense now, right? Pets from the Odelia Village must have been the kidnapping scheme of Joyce Pirates! Doctor Farrell is not the sort of person who will do this.

Ah...thank you so much for helping us do this..I am so relieved. 20 of my pets have been kidnapped by the Jellys. Please return them all back to me. Ah...why did Joyce Pirates have to kidnap our pets...sob* this is too much!
Think about those small and helpless...animals being tortured.

The First Diary of Dr. Farrell
Talk to Pablo in Libra
Welcome. I finally crack the code of Dr. Farrell's First Diary. Do you want to listen?
Are you still here?

Ah? A favor of Larell? Okay what Larell said?%% Ah... he wanted to decode Dr. Farrell's diary but he didn't know something about it? Of course I know substances. Because I wrote it together with him%%

Well~ What's inside... {C=0xFF4400BB/}I wanted to make human and animals free from an incurable disease through biological way. It will be amazing even we just thought about it! There's no patient who suffered from a disease, and there will be no one struggle against with a pain... the world must be fulfill of bright and wonderful dream! Then People will not need a God anymore if my dreams come true. {C=0xFF4400BB/}I was exchanging my opinion with Arcanist Pablo and we researched together beyond on the boarder of science and magic. However, we have met a barrier of research and there's no more progression in our research project.%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}Someday, Paris came to me. And she told me that her young and immortality will make people happier, and she agreed my research along with she let me know everything what she got during her entire life such as alchemy, incantation, and many knowledge. Therefore, I finally got over my research barrier by degrees. {C=0xFF4400BB/}However, I was greedy too much. I researched relentlessly and finally discovered a cell which can control every organism's birth, old age, sickness, and death. And I discovered the way to control of it. Eventually, I've achieved my research that I can control a cell by one simple pill. {C=0xFF4400BB/}But, I needed to cease my research there. My overcrowded desire was whispering me to challenge a God's authority. And finally... I found the way to do. {C=0xFF4400BB/}I shouldn't have to make a dragon which wasn't necessary through a toenail of Elga...%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}I and Paris, we called this organism as Magma Drake Lavalon. But, suddenly I couldn't control myself and my memory was so blurry. Is it a side-effect of medicine that I made?%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}I became violent and my spirit distorted as much as my physical distortion. Is it a compensation of my arrogance which I tried to get over the line of God?%% Here is the content of first diary.. what a surprise... Please give me second one%% It is...!!! It is also!!!!!! I'm surprised!%% A code, again! ...%% I can decode it.... at a glance. I think it must be different style of code. But I know a guy who can decode it.%% That is a Pablo He was mentioned in the first diary so he might know about this already. Get this diary and go to Libra and ask Pablo to decode it, which is much faster way!
You lost Dr. Farrell's Diary? You are so lucky because I got a duplicated one. I will give it to you.
Huh? Dr. Farrell's Diary? I don't think that I have...?
I just decode it...

He was such a genius... You said you came from Port of the Winds, right? Did you hear anything about Farrell?%% Huh? You know??! I didn't expect any news of my buddy from a total stranger!! Interesting!

News of old buddy
Answer to Noel
So, how is he now? Something special? Is his research going well? Ah... My bad. I asked too many questions. Sorry. I will ask one by one. Please answer them in order.
Answer me clearly!

Ah.. what a pity... A true genius who actually succeeded creating a dragon was killed by his own scientific knowledge.... Well, sometimes this happens but even though...%% Ah... I cannot say more... It is enough... Thank you for the news. I think I better work on my research. That may soothe my terrible grief.
How kind you are to understand my grief.
How cruel you are, not to understand my sadness...
So, what was Farrell's research?
He was very interested in mutants surely. So, how far do he go?
Oh....Oh!!!! A werewolf?? Ah. Genius shines no matter where he is. So, how is Farrell?
Tactical Crisis
Speak with Pablo
Um! %name%! How have you been? The Dragon Fellowship needs your help again. Will you assist us?
Monsters? With tactics? How unexpected. The result will be pretty bad. We need to find a solution! Now!!!
How can I help you?? %% Oh. So the Dragon Fellowship is in danger because of monsters' new attack patterns. If you came to me, it means that you are asking for magical support.

We're facing a new problem, caused by the change in the pattern of monster attacks..%% What do you mean, what do I mean? Let me explain something to you.The Dragon Fellowship is an elite group, consisting of powerful, but few individuals. In battle, numerical inferiority is our weak point, however, we usually do well as monsters are not very smart and only go on instincts. They just attack whatever they see in front of them, without thinking.%% However, recently monsters are showing different patterns. %% They continuously attacked one point as their target. I mean, our tactical bases. %% If this is how things will be going from now on, we are going to be having a lot of problems. We cannot defend our key bases because of numerical inferiority, neither can we attack as usual since it will risk our bases at the back. Understand?%% We have to solve this situation otherwise we will lose everything in the very near future. We need new tactics or new... weapons.. or anything. %% Hmm.... I cannot think of anything quickly.%% Well. Brave one, I cannot leave this place since I have to guard the town. If we cannot find any idea from the army, maybe the magicians can find something instead. %% Can you go to Pablo and ask his advice?%%
We will lose Libra in near future. Is that OK to you?
Scientific Support
Speak with Dr. Noel
Ah. Indeed. Yeah of course, we have a lot that we can give.
For the scientific advice, check with Dr. Noel.

Ah.. A kind one who let me know about Farrell. So. What's going on? What? The Dragon Fellowship is in danger now?? How do you say things like that? You know how powerful they are!?%% ...So monsters with new tactics.... Hmm.. I will help you. No, Let me help you, please. There is something I researched and if it is completed, it will be a great help indeed!!%% More than anything, I want to clear both my old buddies, Farrell and science's names this time.

I can help defend with magic, but it has its limit. You know that magic consumes 'Mana', right? Mana is not something that can be continuously drained. How about checking out science rather than magic, dear?%% If you are able to find a proper power source, science can be used in battle for a relatively long time compared to magic. Especially very good in key point defence battles.%% For the sciences... Yeah! How about Dr. Noel over there?
It seems like you don't need my advice.
Help a Friend
Meet Pablo
I said I would help, but there is a problem now. The main power source in my research. It is not completed yet. If Farrell was with me, he would be able to give me hints to solve this problem...
Bring Farrell's Diary from Pablo.
Why did you come back so soon? He also didn't have any ideas? Oh. Diary? He needs it? Hmm... The diary contains very important information... Give me a second here.

Wait. I guess Farrell faced same issue just like I did. But he succeeded making a Drake, right? It means that he found a solution for the power source... Is there anything that Farrell left??%% What? A diary?? Pablo has it? Oh.... OK, if so, I want you to get that for me.%% Farrell used to write down everything in the diary so I think he woudl have also wrote down something about the power source! Come on. OK. I made my decision.
Be careful. This is someone's belonging.

Is this... what Farrell left? Ah... my old buddy will help me through his diary... He is not here with me but he probably would be very proud if his research can be used to help other people.%% I need a moment to read Farrell's diary here. Will you wait for a second?

Since Noel was his best friend and the diary was Farrell's only belonging left, I think Noel deserves to read this. Please pass this to Noel.%% Please tell Noel that I am very sorry to lose Farrell, a great scientist of our age.
You lost it??!! What do you think it is? It's good for me that I didn't give you the original, but a copy. Here it is. Don't ever lose this again.
So, where is Farrell's Diary?
Won't you listen to my decision?
Making power source
Lava Ingot
Flamer Rock
Now I got the solution. Oh yes yes, the secret was the materials which made the machine itself! Just 1 step left till its completion!
Bring me materials. From Lava Boom Boom, get 15 Lava Ingots. From Valid Raeth Mission's Chief Rocker, 1 Flamer Rock. Lava Boom Boom can be found in Valid Raeth Mission mostly.

OK you got all the materials!! I have finished every other process. Ok so... melt this... put it... here... and crush this..... smash everything into........!%% Alright! It is done now. Now I have to equip this to the machine in my lab. Don't you want to be a part of this historical moment? Follow me.

I have other stuff, I think I just need 2 main materials now.... Ok... something which can sustain the source generator's power and its heat.... I think Lava Ingots which Lava Boom Booms are using for their armour will do.%% And the other one... Do you know a monster, Rocker? He uses powerful physical attacks thanks to the Flamer Rocks where he is. Cheif Rocker probably has a lot of those rocks.%% That Flamer Rock will supply our machine with an energy source. Understand? Did you remember what I need? I will tell you again. From Lava Boom Boom, get 15 Lava Ingots. From Valid Raeth Mission's Chief Rocker, 1 Flamer Rock.%% Ah.. I cannot wait!
My research only needs 1 last thing!
I will call it, Guardian.
Speak with Hoffman
So we made the machine and we have to name it. What should we call it... Oh. It 'guard's us all from monsters, so how about Guardian?

Oh, so are you doing what I requested you to do? You should. The battle is getting harder and harder. %% Dr. Noel made a guardian? What is guardian? Oh!! Automatic attack machine with Massive range??!!

OK. Our guardian is ready to go so please go to Hoffman and tell them we are ready. I have a solution which will help the Fellowship. I think he will understand if you explain Guardian as 'Automatic attack machine with Massive range' to him.
You just... are not kind!
Prove it!
Speak with Hoffman

Shadow City (1)
Rice Sack

There is lots and lots of talk around about why Libra is so dark recently. Well, probably because of a Queen Bee who lives in Smoldering Swamp, but there is also a legend about the great Sorcerer Footlake who caused the blackout.%% It was because of the death of his beloved Fairy, that he unleashed his sadness on his hometown.%% Anyway this is a very unpleasant and uncomfortable situation for the townspeople who live here.%% We have to get to Scalding Swamps to get some food but the townspeople are so used to darkness, they cannot go there anymore.%% Thus, we asked the Dragon Fellowship crews to help us by bringing rice sacks. Will you do the same thing for us, young one?
Thank you! We have the ingredients now! This is a token of our appreciation for your service. Here! Take it!

You are a true member of the dragon fellowship. You can get hold of rice sacks through Mama Boom Boom at the Scalding Swamps. Those brats stole all rice sacks while wearing aprons and ran away a while ago saying that they will cook for their own race.

Is Pablo there? Why are you here?
Hmm? Did Hoffman send you?
Pablo isn't far from here. You've probably seen him before.
What do you need?
Hmm... we should find another person to take this job.

There must be a logical reason behind these heavy bouts of rain.%%It appears that peace reigned after the Dragon War, but there were numerous conspiracies abound.%%To prevent scholars from unravelling these nefarious plans, the culprits cursed this place.%%These happenings have been explained in detail. Please deliver this to Hoffman.
Go, hurry. There're things I have to attend to.

Please hurry.

Short Circuiting the Town
Queen Vella

Recently, the whole village is noisy thanks to the story of courageous %name%. I think you were the one who took care of that dreary Lavalon incident, right? Perhaps you have want to take care of the incident that took place in Libra. Although Libra is not so large, it is famous as a commercial city from long ago.%% But somehow the electricity at the village keeps getting cut off these days. Why is something like this happening when we are not making enough money as before...%% Although we have replaced all electric lines coming into this village from generators, the electricity keeps getting cut off and there aren't many more people...%% On top of that, we are running generators for much longer than before to produce more electricity but there is never enough.%% Would you be able to take care of such small affairs in the village?%% Well, perhaps you would ignore it because you are a great hero?
I hope we can escape this darkness as soon as possible. Good luck!

Thank you very much. Because of your effort, there won't be any more incidents of merchants being unable to sell things because of a lack of electricity. I found out something strange as I was arranging the electric lines leaking to Vella. %% This electricity was flowing toward the direction of Drakos from the swamp where Queen Vella is. Drakos is the area where Elga was sealed 1000 years ago. Have you heard the story that Elga has been unsealed now? %% We have no idea what they did with electricity they have stolen and it is more worrying that we are not sure at this time whether this incident will affect our continent.%% And should I say it is the aftermath of Elga... %%Five forces surrounding the earth, people following the force of trees among 5 elements have thrown away their occupation and attached to it.%% Even Anders right next to me is saying everyone in his family left home and they are not coming back. %%The appearance of a new religion when the world is in confusion, wouldn't this clearly have some sort of bad intention?

Hush, I'll talk seriously from now on because you will take care of this. %%Actually, I can guess why this electricity is leaking. The swamp right next to it is very suspicious.%% Queen Vella is at the swamp. Even merchants go around it at times because it she is such a scary monster.%% But the potion merchant said that he saw strong electricity flashing at the area where Vella is.%% Although Vella seems to be the suspect of this electricity leak, it isn't something that can be taken care of just by merchants just handling money.%% That Queen Vella... Please take care of that wicked monster.
That's too bad. Is there no one that can help?

Deliver memo to Hoffman

An old magician stayed here yesterday. He had a hoarse voice, and wore really worn clothes. He fell asleep soon after, so I went to do my chores. %% When I came back, he was gone. Only this piece of paper was left!%% I didn't know what it was so I reported it to the guard, who told Hoffman.%% The guard forgot to take the paper to him though, can you deliver this to Hoffman?
I have other things to do for my customers.
Ah! Is this the strange one? Thank you!
This looks very important, so take good care of it while delivering it.
Well, since you can't do me a favour, stay a while and listen.
The duck that wanted to become a swan

Ah! You are the well-known one.%% Well, I have no reason to live lately. My family left home because of that weird, creepy Woodi religion!%% I just cannot believe this. This is ridiculous! Unbelievable! Nonsense! OK? Please get rid of that weird religion!%% So I can get my family back!!
I wonder what he's doing these days.

Thank you so much..hero..%% One day, violent lumberjacks were cutting down a young tree.. I was frustrated because I didn't have power to stop them..%% At that moment, Paris showed up and told me to become her slayer.. I%% I sold away my spirit to keep the woods safe...%% I tempted people as I became the lord of the woods.. just as Paris had intended..She deceived them into thinking there is everlasting life in the sanctuary of Gods in order to take away their wealth..%% Not only that, but her saying that she would protect the woods.. was a lie..Paris began to cut trees carelessly in order to build her kingdom.. %%I was unable to keep the woods.. and lied to people to make them into beggars..%% And I was bothering many adventurers who were keeping that from happening...As you know, my soul was already being controlled by Paris.. I was just doing what I was told..%% I am so worried about the people I sent away like that.%% I'm worried about many people who I sent to Gods' Sanctuary..%% That Gods' Sanctuary has many people who handed over their soul to gods thinking that they are betrayed... %% Ah.. I'm getting weaker now... I want to help them who think they are betrayed by god...%% With a sob....

Tree Religion..the Guardians of the forest, Woodis gather people, and seduce them with eternal life.%% And people believe such foolish stuff and donate their wealth without any hesitation.%% If you come to Libra, you would have seen lots of crazy woodies in the forest! %% One of them, made a deal with the Evil Witch, Paris, and became a Lord of the Forest. It makes people confused with power of life just like a tree.%% Well, things became tough because of electricity outage, people wanted to believe something supernatural. I keep talking about this to everyone to find my family, but.... others.. they all ignored the truth.%% I've heard that Crazy Woodi's power is so strong, no one but Dragon Fellowship can handle him. %% You are the new star, a new hero of the Fellowship, I believe you can help me on this!
Eh.....that's all in the past, no point hearing that stuff. Good luck on your journey.

Mysterious Being

I guess you are not our enemy since you try to help us. We are Mist Elves who confronted Elga with humans in the past.%% There are only a few of us who are seperated from other elves. We were thrown away by pure elves who we believe to be our family.%% They still want to get rid of us so we hide from them... We believed that humans will side with us and go back to normal life again... that was our belief until now%% I don't even remember how long we've been hiding like this. We heard the rumor, that monster we created to confront the evil dragon before, is active now.%% If pure elves find out that the monster is still active, they'll send more soldiers to catch us.%% To avoid that, we need to deactivate the monster Aram and figure out what made this monster activate again. But we don't have enough power to go through there.%% The weird power from Gods' Sanctuary is taking our power away. I don't think it will affect the humans but to us, this vicious power of the forest is fatal.
Then I'll be counting on you.
The one who is behind all this is the human we trusted so much... The power of this evil Human is greater than ours...

You are very strong. I was rude before, and if you can forgive me, I would like you to help.%% Can you defeat Aram to keep our secret? To be exact, take care of the person that is behind activating Aram.%% We got so weak and we cannot confront the person who might be controlling Aram. Then good luck to you.
Even if you refuse, there is nothing I can do. I'll respect your decision.

The one who controlled Aram. I know who he is. His name is Mutisha.%% Among humans, only he possesses power almost as strong as ours. It was a surprise to us that humans could possess such power.%% Humans can possess several different kinds of power, but among them, this Psychokinesis was the hardest one to have.%% He used it fully and maximized it very effectively too.
I'll be counting on you.
Mutisha's vicious mind is really strong. As long as I can feel him, he can come back any time and control Aram.%% Because of you, we can still hide us for a while.

Thanks to you, this was resolved. But we could not block all the powers of Aram.%% The soul of a human with such a vicious mind cannot be easily destroyed. I can feel him again. Can you confront Mutisha once again?%% When you come back, I'll give you the blueprint to create a strong weapon using Aram's pieces.
Even if you refuse, there is nothing I can do. I'll respect your decision.
Possess Mist Elf's Weapon! (1)
Talk to Rugor.

To express my appreciation, I will explain how to make mist elves' weapon. Since we have to go now, simply, I will impart the knowlegde to you using magic. %% ..... .........................OK. It's done.%% There is another human who knows about this magic. Have you been through Pine Cone Hills?%% Rugor, my friend is there. If you pass this knowledge to him, he will make a weapon for you.
Go find Rugor.
What? Me! How... Hel... No, quiet, quiet... (How do you know Hel Krouzer?)
Find Rugor from Pine Cone Hills and tell him my name. The meeting between him and I is secret, so be careful when you talk to him.
If you want to get a excellent weapon, let me know.

Love and Limitations (1)
Fairy of the Forest - Grania

I regret what I've done... Not taking care of the one I love...%% I fell in love at first sight. She accepted my proposal...%%Everything was great at the time, and we were happy. My only wish was to make her mine. We got married...%% But the happiness was short lived and the marriage started to crack...%%On our first night as husband and wife she... she wouldn't take off her clothes. First, I didn't think much of it, but as time passed it became frustrating.%% Then one day, I saw her leave the house so I followed her... Without knowing what is waiting for me!%% But what do you know... she wasn't human. She was a fairy from the Land of Temptation.%%How could she trick me into believing she was human... I felt betrayed, and scared... so I ran away.%% A month had passed... I really hated her for what she did to me. But as time passes by, I think I can understand her. I keep thinking about her and want to see her again... it drives me crazy!%%Does she wonder about me too? Of course, she probably knew I ran away because I found out she was a fairy, will she punish me for that? Will she seek revenge?%% I don't know if fairies can harm humans... I'm confused. I just want to see her. That's all I want.%% Do you understand? %class%, can you find her for me?
I know I'm asking for a lot, but could you please deliver this message?
Who are you? What do you want with me?
The Fairies are probably located near the {C=0xFF016295/}Frigid Canyon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Her name is {C=0xFF016295/}Grania{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Meet Grania

You met Grania! What did she say...?%% Does she want to slay me? Or does she want to see me?%% Really? She missed me too! Haha... Bring me to her then...%% I don't care anymore who she really is... Love and Limitations (4)
Snake Flower Cane

Why did you look for me? You met Ringo, what did he say? ... letter?%% {C=0xFF4400BB/} ' Please return to me... I made a big mistake. I can't do anything by myself. Please return to me, I'll never leave you again... I love you' - Ringo- %% This letter... Why did he have to leave me, he's so stupid! Really stupid! Just tell him I don't need anything from him anymore!%% Please go, I don't want to see you either!%% Wait. Hey, wait...%% You can't leave me here even if I tell you so...%% Aren't you suppose to convince me to see him again? Why leave so easily? Listen to what I have to say!%% Yes... yes... I really miss him too. Miss him so much that it hurts.%% But my kind have discovered that I married a human. There's not much time... If you don't hurry and bring it to me... I'll be stuck here for the next 80 years!
You've found the Snake Flower Cane! You've been a big help to me! Thank you very much!
Thank you. You truly are one of a kind! There's not much time left... Follow this road and bring me back Arka's Snake Flower Cane.
Gosh, I was such a fool to trust you... Goodbye!

Love and Limitations (5)
Meet Ringo

I am sorry... I think it is too late even though you got the Snake Flower Cane for me... My time ran out so now, the Snake Flower Cane won't work anymore...%% That's right, I cannot escape for 80 years from now...%% Don't worry, I won't blame you for this... I'll accept it as my destiny.%% Humans can only live for 80 years or so... Isn't that right?%% Yes... I am right...%% Please... Bring this letter to Ringo... Don't tell him anything about me, please... don't. Just... give him this letter.
Why are you still here? How is the task coming along?

Why did you come back alone? Where is Grania? Please tell me what happened!%% A letter??%% {C=0xFF4400BB/} Stupid Ringo... You made me believe humans were just mere animals. I was a spy sent to watch over Fungoids and Humans. {C=0xFF4400BB/} I thought I was lucky when I met you as you were a good tool to use for spying on my subjects...%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}Letting you find out about me was a huge mistake. Don't try to find me, don't miss me. Don't even try to look for me again... Wake up! Humans and Fairies cannot love each other... Just forget about me...%% I knew we would end up like this...%%Don't love someone you shouldn't love... I'll be waiting for you in your next life. We'll meet as a human and fairy, when that time comes I hope our love and time together would last for a long long time... Good bye%%
Please don't come back...
Is that so hard to tell him?

What's the truth behind this girl?

I will soon be away from this place to be hidden deeply in the Frigid Canyon%% Because you helped me, I'll also let you know something surprising.. Although it is related to our fairy.. ...%% The fairies living in these woods are were changed into fairies after they were originally humans.%% Once you become a fairy, you cannot feel love or hate between the opposite gender, unlike human beings they must not have emotions about anything other than themselves. Once you become a fairy, you must live by the will of Iruryl, the mother of all fairies and god. %% Although you can have beautiful appearance and can live much longer life once you become a fairy, you must live according to the will of Iruryl. That's why a human being turning into fairy requires absolute choice according to one's own will.%% Our fairies traditionally respect the thoughts of everyone. They don't force their own intentions on people and they don't get greedy. This is also the way of Iruryl.%% But while the great fairy named Arcara was a human being originally who was changed into a fairy, she wasn't following the ways of Iruryl. She was kidnapping little children in contrary to the will of Iruryl and making them into evil fairies following her, regardless of their own will%% Please stop her.. so there won't be any more victims like me.%%
It may not be my place to say but, please hurry!

Ugh...I can remember now... Why I am like this. Thank you %class%.%% I was born in Island of Birth next to the Continent of Wind. My grandfather is one of five heroes who fought against Elga with Paris. But I'm not sure about the details of our parents passing away. I grew up being teased by neighborhood kids because I was a loner without parents.%% Meanwhile, Paris brought me here to the Continent of Winds when she met me. She made be become a fairy...She would come to me someimes and she was so nice to me...I followed her a like mother. I was living by her will and never disobeyed her...%% I was keeping the heroes at the Ellora Camp by the will of Paris until Elga recovers power.. I know this isn't' the right thing to do, but I couldn't go against her will. I thought going against her will would be betraying her kindness towards me...%% But I feel so heart broken because Paris was just using me as one of her fairies here.%% I realized it was not the right decision, but I don't want to regret it. Although Paris deceived me, I think at least once, or at least one moment of her warm feelings was true%% Please make her realize that she had wrong intentions. She should still have a soft and nice heart somewhere.%%
Thank you. Really She should be hiding the farthest southwest area (Scenario Mode F5).%% Please hurry.
How can you forsake me on my time of need!
Legend of Mimir

What will become of our tribe now?. Everybody is being captured as sacrifices...sigh...%% Oh, I didn't see you there, did you hear me? I don't think you'd be of much help.%% We used to have this Mushroom Lifestone that kept us living strong... But one day this giant owl flew in and took the stone...%% We're still receiving the life force so it's alright but the troublemakers in the area, the Mimir tribe started capturing us saying that the Mimir God has come.%% I wish someone would take care of that Barom guy... . .
What're you standing around for? I can't even sleep because of the worrying!

That ritual signifies the tragedy of the destruction of the symbol that they believed in. I guess they can escape the vicious circle now.%% I never wanted revenge on them. I guess we'll each go our separate ways.

You are going to do it? Hmm. . . You sure you can?%% There's an abandoned village right around here that seems like time just stopped. People call it the Forgotten Village...%% There is a small cave where Bubobubo lives. [Scenario Mode(F5)] Could you eradicate them for me?
There probably isn't much you can do for us anyway. Could be too dangerous for you.
Human and Fungoid Ties (4)
Deliver Letter to Lord Steven Jr.
Hmmm... %class%, I'm sorry that I doubt humans until now.%% I wrote an apology letter to your Lord. Can you deliver this to Steven Jr.? You will do that, right?
*cough* *cough* Be sure to deliver that letter to Lord Steven, okay?

%class%, what happened? Eh? A letter for me? Let me see...%% A letter from the Fungoid Chief? Why would he send one to me? Let me read this.%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}How are you? {C=0xFF4400BB/}Lord Steven Jr. of Port of the Winds. I would like to apologize to the humans, for I have wronged them.%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}Young %name% here has opened my eyes and done us a huge favour of goodwill. I will explain the details once you're here. We graciously await for your arrival, and hope for your forgiveness.%% {C=0xFF4400BB/}I hope that this will be the beginning of an amicable relationship. {C=0xFF4400BB/}Fungoid Chief {C=0xFF4400BB/}-Fungarf-{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% I-I'm... You! You have done a tremendous job! I thought the ties with the Fungoids were lost.%% This is good news! I cannot believe this! Hahaha!! I'm so proud of you.%% Please give me a moment to collect myself, I need to bestow a reward worthy of your deeds.

Thank you again, young one. You will become a valuable warrior, I see it in you... Haha...%% Well anyway, please deliver this first anyway. I will give you a {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds Return Scroll{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so you can go faster. I'll be counting on you.
What do you need from me, %class%?
Hmmm... Are you in some sort of a hurry? *cough* *cough* O-Okay, when you're done, come back to me!
Mission Completed!
Meeting the Superior Officer at Fungoid Village
Oh, I am sorry to keep you waiting. Here, take this mark and go to the Superior Officer at Fungoid Village. They'll give you a big reward.

Are you having trouble with using the return scroll? Open your back and find {C=0xFF016295/}Fungoid Village return scroll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. %% Tear the scroll and you will be at Fungoid Village. Hahaha.

Oh! You've come, %name%. Do you have any idea what you've achieved? Steven Jr. himself will give you a reward!%% %name%, you've done an excellent job! Our differences with the Fungoids are now settled!%% You've upheld our honour, and warriors like us can put our heads up high now!! Anyway, I can promote you now.%% Hmmm... Will you talk to me a little bit later?
You've performed an outstanding service for this country! God bless you in your future! Farewell! If you use {C=0xFF016295/}Fungoid Village return scroll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you can go there at once.
You're back! So you took care of everything? You seem to have forgotten something? Look through your belongings carefully!
Huh? You refused my request? Why are you refusing my reward? Is there something you have to take care of in a hurry? Hmmm... I don't understand.

%name%, you've returned! Your deeds have not gone unnoticed. Because of you, %name%, our relationship with the Fungoid Tribe is in harmony once again.%% The gods must have blessed us. I didn't expect you to do such a good job... It makes me feel so good!%% As promised, I'll promote you! Will you talk to me a bit later?
%name%, you finally came! You did a great job. Huh? You didn't bring your spear? Look through your bags carefully.

Hey, %name%. You finally came to see me! I was waiting for you. We all know of your honourable work.%% Haha! I didn't expect you to do such a good job, but because of you, we're on friendly terms with the Fungoids now! You make me so jealous of your excellent work and cute looks too! Haha.%% Hey, I'm just joking, don't freak out, okay? Anyway, as promised, I'll have no choice but to promote you! Talk to me a while later.
Hey, %name%! You finally came. I've been expecting you.

%name%! While I was away, the rumours spread really fast. You helped the Fungoid Village, and receiving an award from the Lord himself, that's really big.%% Aren't you something? As I promised, I'll promote you. Will you wait while I prepare?
%name%, over here! The rumours spread fast while I was away! Huh? You look like you have forgotten something. Look through your inventory carefully.
Friendly Relationship
Stage 10 in the defence mode of Gods' Sanctuary

For helping us, people have placed the stones in the mission of Defence mode at Gods' Sanctuary, I heard. I'm so much comfortable due to have observed like those Evil Kentarous.%% Thanks heaps. Therefore, I would like to express my sincere feeling for your dedicational service for us.%% It must not a big deal.%% I think I can provide continuous support (EXP + Gold) when you defend the stones every time.%% Are you a person who was a spearhead of the stones protector, right?
Didn't I told you that I got a condition to help you once a day?
I'm so happy to be with you at here!
Thanks. But they aren't easy-going bastards. I heard that more stronger Kentars are there, so please be careful.
Oh, I might wrong, Sorry

Okay... If you complete this task well enough, I will no longer have to threaten you with this matter. Good luck! You can find the necklaces in the Forgotten Village Mission Map.
You refuse? Then just forget it! Chief! Here is one human! Shoontin!
Pain remedy herb
Clot of Green Vegetable Oil
Clot of Blue Vegetable Oil

Hello there! I heard you can understand our Fungoid Language, can I talk to you?%% Thank you! Actually our Chief suffers from neuralgia.%% He is 532 years old this year. The pain has become worse because of what happened to his village...%% I've heard a good medicine for us Fungoids for neuralgia is {C=0xFF016295/}a clot of Vegetable Oil{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...%% I am not forcing you to find it, but if you want to leave a good impression on the Chief, you should think about it.
If you find the items, come back and talk to me. If not, don't waste my time.
Thank you very much. I will tell the elder that the %class% has acquired this item for us. (Do I look stupid? I'm going to tell him that I found it... Haha!)

Ah! Will you do that?%% (Actually I am the one assigned for the job but good enough for me)%% Thank you for your concern. We need {C=0xFF016295/}Green Clot Vegetable Oil and Blue Clot Vegetable Oil{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% You can find these while slaying monsters like {C=0xFF016295/}Evil Vine Flower and Evil Seed Flower{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. 20 of each would be enough, I think.%% Then I'll be counting on you, alright.
I see, I'll see you around then.
Passable road

We used to have a safe path through the forest, but since a Dragon destroyed us severely, it can no longer be used.%% We constructed an alternative route but now there are {C=0xFF016295/}Worms{C=0xFF4D0D08/}there looking for food.%%So at the moment the pathway is not safe at all. %class%, please slay those huge Worms so Fungoid Villagers can use the pathway without fear again.
It's still too difficult to travel that road. Go and slay 50 Worms.
Thank you very much. Because of you %class%, our Fungoid Village is now more safer. Here, this is a token of our gratitude.
You can help us by slaying {C=0xFF016295/}30 Worms{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. As I've told you before, they live in the Forgotten Village. We're all counting on you.
I'm sorry, I can't do that. %class% is the only one who can complete this task.
Iron scale armour
Horned Worm Skin

I can't stand it anymore. I've made up my mind!%%I want my revenge on the Dragons. That's why I am making these iron armour scales.%%I don't know who will wear them but I swear if something like this happens again, I'll give the armour to any warrior willing to fight them.%% Strong armour needs strong materials to withstand the fiery breath of the Dragons.%%I heard the armour the Lava horns wear is really good...%%If this is not too much to ask, %class%, will you retrieve some for me?%% I think %class%s can slay {C=0xFF016295/}Larva Horns{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, will you help?
But as I've told you before, this will really help us out.
Oh! You've collected it all? Truly remarkable! Thank you. This is a gift... Please take this.
Thank you. Get me 40 {C=0xFF016295/}Horned Worm Skins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%%I do feel sorry to ask you for this favour. But as I've told you before, this will really help us.

The food... Haha As you've probably seen yourself... The food is not great...%% I heard there is a master chef around here... can you find out who it is? I am so depressed because of the food.
